        // Left door frame post
        const leftPost = new THREE.Mesh(framePostGeometry, framePostMaterial);
        leftPost.position.set(wallX, (wallHeight + 0.5) / 2, entranceZ - 3);
        leftPost.castShadow = true;
        scene.add(leftPost);

        // Right door frame post
        const rightPost = new THREE.Mesh(framePostGeometry, framePostMaterial);
        rightPost.position.set(wallX, (wallHeight + 0.5) / 2, entranceZ + 3);
        rightPost.castShadow = true;
        scene.add(rightPost);

        // Door frame - top beam

        // Welcome mat

        // Glass door panels (decorative - suggests automatic doors)

      function createPlayer() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.player;

        // Create player using stickman model
        if (stickmanModelLoaded && stickmanModelTemplate) {
          player = createStickmanInstance(0xffffff);
        } else {
          // Fallback to original player creation if model not loaded
          player = new THREE.Group();

          // Body (chef uniform)
          const bodyGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.5, 0.6, 1.4, 16);
          const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0xffffff,
            roughness: 0.5,
            metalness: 0.1,
          });
          const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial);
          body.position.y = 0.7;
          body.castShadow = true;
          player.add(body);

          // Apron
          const apronGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.8, 0.8, 0.15);
          const apronMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: config.color,
            roughness: 0.6,
          });
          const apron = new THREE.Mesh(apronGeometry, apronMaterial);
          apron.position.set(0, 0.5, 0.35);
          apron.castShadow = true;
          player.add(apron);

          // Head
          const headGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.45, 16, 16);
          const headMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0xffdbac,
            roughness: 0.6,
          });
          const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeometry, headMaterial);
          head.position.y = 1.7;
          head.castShadow = true;
          player.add(head);

          // Chef hat
          const hatBaseGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.5, 0.5, 0.15, 16);
          const hatMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0xffffff,
            roughness: 0.4,
          });
          const hatBase = new THREE.Mesh(hatBaseGeometry, hatMaterial);
          hatBase.position.y = 2.1;
          hatBase.castShadow = true;
          player.add(hatBase);

          const hatTopGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.4, 0.45, 0.5, 16);
          const hatTop = new THREE.Mesh(hatTopGeometry, hatMaterial);
          hatTop.position.y = 2.4;
          hatTop.castShadow = true;
          player.add(hatTop);

          // Eyes
          const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.08, 8, 8);
          const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: 0x333333,
          });

          const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial);
          leftEye.position.set(-0.15, 1.75, 0.35);
          player.add(leftEye);

          const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial);
          rightEye.position.set(0.15, 1.75, 0.35);
          player.add(rightEye);

          player.userData.squishState = {
            scaleY: 1,
            scaleXZ: 1,
            targetScaleY: 1,
            targetScaleXZ: 1,
          };
        }

        player.position.set(config.startX, 0, config.startZ);

        // Serving tray (held in front) - add to all player types
        createTray(player, PLAYER_HEIGHT);

        const maxCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        maxCanvas.width = 128;
        maxCanvas.height = 64;
        const maxCtx = maxCanvas.getContext('2d');
        maxCtx.fillStyle = '#FF0000';
        maxCtx.font = 'bold 40px Arial';
        maxCtx.textAlign = 'center';
        maxCtx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        maxCtx.lineWidth = 4;
        maxCtx.strokeStyle = '#FFFFFF';
        maxCtx.strokeText('MAX', 64, 32);
        maxCtx.fillText('MAX', 64, 32);
        const maxTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(maxCanvas);
        const maxMat = new THREE.SpriteMaterial({
          map: maxTex,
          depthTest: false,
          transparent: true,
        });
        const maxSprite = new THREE.Sprite(maxMat);
        maxSprite.scale.set(1.5, 0.75, 1);
        maxSprite.position.y = PLAYER_HEIGHT + 1;
        maxSprite.visible = false;
        player.add(maxSprite);
        player.userData.maxSprite = maxSprite;

        scene.add(player);
      }

      function createSellZone() {

        const iconGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Coin stack base
        const coinGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.5, 0.5, 0.15, 16);
        const coinMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xffd700,
          // Gold
          roughness: 0.3,
          metalness: 0.7,
        });

        // Stack of coins
        for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
          const coin = new THREE.Mesh(coinGeometry, coinMaterial);
          coin.position.y = i * 0.12;

        // Dollar sign on top coin
        const dollarGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.15, 0.3, 0.05);
        const dollarMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xb8860b,

          roughness: 0.4,
        });
        const dollarSign = new THREE.Mesh(dollarGeometry, dollarMaterial);
        dollarSign.position.set(0, 0.3, 0.28);
        iconGroup.add(dollarSign);

        iconGroup.position.set(config.x, 0.5, config.z);
        iconGroup.userData.baseY = 0.5;
        scene.add(iconGroup);
        moneyZoneMesh.userData.signIndicator = iconGroup;
        moneyZoneMesh.userData.borderMesh = border;
      }

      function createDriveThruBooth() {

        const boothHeight = 4;

        const boothMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: config.color,
          roughness: 0.6,
          metalness: 0.1,

        driveThruBoothMesh.position.set(config.x, boothHeight / 2, config.z);
        driveThruBoothMesh.castShadow = true;
        driveThruBoothMesh.receiveShadow = true;
        scene.add(driveThruBoothMesh);
        // apply rotation from config if specified (degrees)
        driveThruBoothMesh.rotation.y = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(config.rotation || 0);

        // Roof/awning

        driveThruBoothMesh.userData.cashPileDepth = dtCashPileDepth;

      function createCarMesh() {
        const carGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Car type configuration
        const carTypes = [
          { name: 'sedan', bodyScale: [1, 1, 1], roofScale: [1, 1, 1], roofPos: [0, 1.3, -0.3], visor: false },
          { name: 'suv', bodyScale: [1.1, 1.3, 1], roofScale: [1.1, 1, 1.2], roofPos: [0, 1.7, -0.1], visor: false },
          { name: 'truck', bodyScale: [1.1, 0.9, 1.1], roofScale: [1.1, 1, 0.6], roofPos: [0, 1.4, 0.8], visor: true },
          { name: 'compact', bodyScale: [0.9, 0.9, 0.8], roofScale: [0.9, 1, 0.8], roofPos: [0, 1.3, 0], visor: false }
        ];
        
        const type = carTypes[Math.floor(Math.random() * carTypes.length)];

        // Random car colors
        const carColors = [0xe74c3c, 0x3498db, 0x2ecc71, 0xf39c12, 0x9b59b6, 0x1abc9c, 0x34495e, 0xffffff, 0xbdc3c7];
        const carColor = carColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * carColors.length)];

        // Car body
        const bodyGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2, 0.8, 4);
        const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: carColor,
          roughness: 0.3,
          metalness: 0.4,
        });
        const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial);
        body.position.y = 0.6 * type.bodyScale[1];
        body.scale.set(type.bodyScale[0], type.bodyScale[1], type.bodyScale[2]);
        body.castShadow = true;
        carGroup.add(body);

        // Car cabin/roof
        const cabinGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.6, 0.6, 2);
        const cabin = new THREE.Mesh(cabinGeometry, bodyMaterial);
        cabin.position.set(type.roofPos[0], type.roofPos[1], type.roofPos[2]);
        cabin.scale.set(type.roofScale[0], type.roofScale[1], type.roofScale[2]);
        cabin.castShadow = true;
        carGroup.add(cabin);

        // Windows
        const windowMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x87ceeb,
          roughness: 0.1,
          metalness: 0.3,
          transparent: true,
          opacity: 0.7,
        });

        // Front windshield
        const frontWindowGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.4 * type.roofScale[0], 0.5 * type.roofScale[1], 0.1);
        const frontWindow = new THREE.Mesh(frontWindowGeometry, windowMaterial);
        frontWindow.position.set(type.roofPos[0], type.roofPos[1] - 0.05, type.roofPos[2] + 0.95 * type.roofScale[2]);
        frontWindow.rotation.x = -0.3;
        carGroup.add(frontWindow);

        // Truck details
        if (type.visor) {
           const visorGeom = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.8, 0.1, 0.4);
           const visor = new THREE.Mesh(visorGeom, new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color: 0x222222 }));
           visor.position.set(0, type.roofPos[1] + 0.3, type.roofPos[2] + 0.6);
           carGroup.add(visor);
        }

        // Wheels
        const wheelGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.35, 0.35, 0.25, 12);
        const wheelMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x222222,
          roughness: 0.8,
        });

        const wheelPositions = [
          [-0.9 * type.bodyScale[0], 0.35, 1.2 * type.bodyScale[2]],
          [0.9 * type.bodyScale[0], 0.35, 1.2 * type.bodyScale[2]],
          [-0.9 * type.bodyScale[0], 0.35, -1.2 * type.bodyScale[2]],
          [0.9 * type.bodyScale[0], 0.35, -1.2 * type.bodyScale[2]],
        ];

        wheelPositions.forEach((pos) => {
          const wheel = new THREE.Mesh(wheelGeometry, wheelMaterial);
          wheel.position.set(pos[0], pos[1], pos[2]);
          wheel.rotation.z = Math.PI / 2;
          wheel.castShadow = true;
          carGroup.add(wheel);
        });

        // Headlights
        const headlightGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.18, 0.18, 0.1, 8);
        const headlightMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xffffaa,
          emissive: 0xffff00,
          emissiveIntensity: 0.5,
          roughness: 0.2,
        });

        const leftHeadlight = new THREE.Mesh(headlightGeometry, headlightMaterial);
        leftHeadlight.position.set(-0.65 * type.bodyScale[0], 0.6 * type.bodyScale[1], 2 * type.bodyScale[2]);
        leftHeadlight.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
        carGroup.add(leftHeadlight);

        const rightHeadlight = new THREE.Mesh(headlightGeometry, headlightMaterial);
        rightHeadlight.position.set(0.65 * type.bodyScale[0], 0.6 * type.bodyScale[1], 2 * type.bodyScale[2]);
        rightHeadlight.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
        carGroup.add(rightHeadlight);

        // Tail lights
        const tailLightGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.4, 0.2, 0.1);
        const tailLightMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xff0000,
          emissive: 0xff0000,
          emissiveIntensity: 0.4,
          roughness: 0.2,
        });

        const leftTail = new THREE.Mesh(tailLightGeometry, tailLightMaterial);
        leftTail.position.set(-0.7 * type.bodyScale[0], 0.6 * type.bodyScale[1], -2 * type.bodyScale[2]);
        carGroup.add(leftTail);

        const rightTail = new THREE.Mesh(tailLightGeometry, tailLightMaterial);
        rightTail.position.set(0.7 * type.bodyScale[0], 0.6 * type.bodyScale[1], -2 * type.bodyScale[2]);
        carGroup.add(rightTail);

        // Initialize squish state
        carGroup.userData.squishState = {
          scaleY: 1,
          scaleXZ: 1,
          targetScaleY: 1,
          targetScaleXZ: 1,
        };

        return carGroup;
      }

      function spawnDriveThruCar() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth;
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;

        const mesh = createCarMesh();

        // Spawn off-screen from the right
        const startX = config.x;
        const startZ = RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2 + 10;

        mesh.position.set(startX, 0, startZ);
        mesh.rotation.y = Math.PI;
        // Face toward the booth
        scene.add(mesh);

        // Calculate position in queue
        const queuePosition = driveThruCarQueue.filter(
          (c) => c.state === 'waiting' || c.state === 'driving'
        ).length;
        const targetZ = config.z + config.depth / 2 + 3 + queuePosition * CAR_SPACING;

        const car = {
          mesh: mesh,
          state: 'driving',
          targetZ: targetZ,
          queuePosition: queuePosition,
          waitTime: 0,
          satisfied: false,
        };

        driveThruCarQueue.push(car);
      }

      function removeDriveThruCar(car) {
        car.state = 'leaving';
        car.targetZ = -RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2 - 15;
      }

      function addBurgerToDriveThru(menuItem = null) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth;
        if (driveThruBurgerStack.length >= config.maxBurgers) return false;

        const food = createStackItem(menuItem);

        // Stack burgers in a grid on the counter
        const stackIndex = driveThruBurgerStack.length;
        const col = stackIndex % 3;
        const row = Math.floor((stackIndex % 9) / 3);
        const layer = Math.floor(stackIndex / 9);

        const counterX = config.x;
        const counterZ = config.z + config.depth / 2 + 0.5;

        food.position.set(
          counterX - 0.6 + col * 0.6,
          1.2 + layer * 0.25,
          counterZ - 0.3 + row * 0.3
        );

        food.rotation.y = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;

        scene.add(food);
        driveThruBurgerStack.push(food);

        return true;
      }

      function removeBurgerFromDriveThru() {
        if (driveThruBurgerStack.length === 0) return null;

        const food = driveThruBurgerStack.pop();
        const menuItem = food.userData.menuItem;
        scene.remove(food);

        food.traverse((child) => {
          if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
          if (child.material) {
            if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
            else child.material.dispose();
          }
        });

        return menuItem;
      }

      function addToDriveThruCashPile() {
        const cashPileX = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.cashPileX;
        const cashPileZ = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.cashPileZ;
        const cashPileWidth = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.cashPileWidth;
        const cashPileDepth = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.cashPileDepth;

        const stackIndex = driveThruCashPile.length;
        const cols = 3;
        const rows = 3;
        const itemsPerLayer = cols * rows;
        const col = stackIndex % cols;
        const row = Math.floor((stackIndex % itemsPerLayer) / cols);
        const layer = Math.floor(stackIndex / itemsPerLayer);

        const cellWidth = (cashPileWidth - 0.3) / cols;
        const cellDepth = (cashPileDepth - 0.2) / rows;

        const x = cashPileX - (cashPileWidth - 0.3) / 2 + cellWidth / 2 + col * cellWidth;
        const z = cashPileZ - (cashPileDepth - 0.2) / 2 + cellDepth / 2 + row * cellDepth;
        const y = 0.25 + layer * 0.12;

        return {
          x,
          y,
          z,
        };
      }

      function createDriveThruCashPileMoney(targetX, targetY, targetZ) {
        const moneyGroup = new THREE.Group();

        const asset = lib.getAsset('paper_money');
        if (asset && asset.url) {
          const geom = getCachedGeometry(
            'paperMoneyBoxGeom',
            () => new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.0, 0.15, 0.6)
          );
          const topMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'paperMoneyTopMat',
            () =>
              new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                map: new THREE.TextureLoader().load(asset.url),
                transparent: true,
                alphaTest: 0.1,
              })
          );
          const sideMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'paperMoneySideMat',
            () =>
              new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                color: 0x85bb65,
              })
          );
          const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geom, [sideMat, sideMat, topMat, sideMat, sideMat, sideMat]);
          mesh.position.y = 0.075;
          mesh.castShadow = true;
          moneyGroup.add(mesh);
        } else {
          const stackGeom = getCachedGeometry(
            'cpStackGeom',
            () => new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.85, 0.1, 0.5)
          );
          const stackMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'moneyStackMat',
            () =>
              new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                color: 0x85bb65,
                roughness: 0.6,
                metalness: 0.1,
              })
          );
          const stack = new THREE.Mesh(stackGeom, stackMat);
          stack.position.y = 0.05;
          stack.castShadow = true;
          moneyGroup.add(stack);

          const bandGeom = getCachedGeometry(
            'cpBandGeom',
            () => new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.87, 0.05, 0.12)
          );
          const bandMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'moneyBandMat',
            () =>
              new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                color: 0xffffff,
                roughness: 0.4,
              })
          );
          const band = new THREE.Mesh(bandGeom, bandMat);
          band.position.y = 0.05;
          moneyGroup.add(band);
        }

        moneyGroup.position.set(targetX, targetY, targetZ);
        moneyGroup.rotation.y = 0;
        moneyGroup.castShadow = true;

        moneyGroup.userData.isCashPileMoney = true;
        moneyGroup.userData.collected = false;

        scene.add(moneyGroup);
        driveThruCashPile.push(moneyGroup);

        return moneyGroup;
      }

      function updateDriveThruBooth(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth;
        if (!config || config.deleted || !driveThruBoothMesh) return;

        // Check if player is in drive-thru deposit zone
        const depositZoneX = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 3;
        // Positioned inside the right wall
        const depositZoneZ = config.z;
        const inZoneX = Math.abs(player.position.x - depositZoneX) < 2;
        // Match the glow size
        const inZoneZ = Math.abs(player.position.z - depositZoneZ) < 2;
        isInDriveThruZone = inZoneX && inZoneZ;

        // Deposit burgers when in zone
        if (
          isInDriveThruZone &&
          currentStackCount > 0 &&
          driveThruBurgerStack.length < config.maxBurgers
        ) {
          driveThruDepositTimer += deltaTime;

          if (driveThruDepositTimer >= DRIVE_THRU_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
            driveThruDepositTimer = 0;
            window.gameConfig.tutorialHasSeenDriveThruHint = true;

            if (playerStack.length > 0) {
              const item = playerStack.pop();
              const menuItem = item.userData.menuItem;
              player.remove(item);
              currentStackCount = playerStack.length;
              updateStackUI();

              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                z: player.position.z,
              };

              const counterX = config.x;
              const targetPos = {
                x: counterX,
                y: 1.3,
                z: config.z + config.depth / 2 + 0.5,
              };

              createFlyingItem(
                startPos,
                targetPos,
                'burger',
                () => {
                  addBurgerToDriveThru(menuItem);
                  playSound('pickup_sound');
                },
                true
              );

              item.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                  else child.material.dispose();
                }
              });
            }
          }
        } else {
          driveThruDepositTimer = 0;
        }

        // Animate glow
        if (driveThruBoothGlow) {
          const pulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
          driveThruBoothGlow.scale.set(pulse, 1, pulse);

          if (driveThruBurgerStack.length === 0) {
            driveThruBoothGlow.material.color.setHex(0xe74c3c);
          } else if (driveThruBurgerStack.length >= config.maxBurgers) {
            driveThruBoothGlow.material.color.setHex(0xf39c12);
          } else {
            driveThruBoothGlow.material.color.setHex(0x27ae60);
          }
        }

        // Animate sign/car icon
        const carIcon = driveThruBoothMesh?.userData?.carIcon;
        if (carIcon) {
          carIcon.position.y = 5.2 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
        }

        // Animate cash pile glow
        if (driveThruCashPileGlow) {
          const cashPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
          driveThruCashPileGlow.scale.set(cashPulse, 1, cashPulse);

          if (driveThruCashPile.length > 0) {
            driveThruCashPileGlow.material.color.setHex(0xffd700);
            driveThruCashPileGlow.material.opacity = 0.6;
          } else {
            driveThruCashPileGlow.material.color.setHex(0xf39c12);
            driveThruCashPileGlow.material.opacity = 0.3;
          }
        }

        const maxMoney =
          (config.maxMoney || 50) + (window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades?.cashpile || 0) * 20;
        if (driveThruCashPileMesh && driveThruCashPileMesh.userData.maxSprite) {
          const isMax = driveThruCashPile.length >= maxMoney;
          driveThruCashPileMesh.userData.maxSprite.visible = isMax;
          if (isMax) {
            const layer = Math.floor(driveThruCashPile.length / 9);
            driveThruCashPileMesh.userData.maxSprite.position.y =
              0.5 + layer * 0.12 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.005) * 0.1;
          }
        }
      }

      function updateDriveThruCashPile(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        if (
          !window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth ||
          window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth.deleted ||
          !driveThruBoothMesh
        )
          return;

        const playerX = player.position.x;
        const playerY = player.position.y;
        const playerZ = player.position.z;

        // Automatically collect drive-thru earnings
        if (driveThruCashPile.length > 0) {
          let collectedCount = 0;
          while (driveThruCashPile.length > 0) {
            const money = driveThruCashPile.pop();

            const startPos = {
              x: money.position.x,
              y: money.position.y + 0.3,
              z: money.position.z,
            };

            const targetPos = {
              x: playerX,
              y: playerY + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
              z: playerZ,
            };

            const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;

            createFlyingItem(
              startPos,
              targetPos,
              'money',
              () => {
                modifyVaultBalance(moneyValue);
                if (collectedCount === 0) playSound('pickup_sound');
              },
              true
            );

            scene.remove(money);
            money.traverse((child) => {
              if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
              if (child.material) {
                if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                else child.material.dispose();
              }
            });
            collectedCount++;
          }
          if (collectedCount > 0) playSound('pickup_sound');
        }
      }

      function updateCashierStall(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
        if (!config || config.deleted || !cashierStallMesh) return;

        // Check if player is in cashier deposit zone (behind counter)
        const depositZoneZ = config.z - config.depth / 2 - 1;
        const inZoneX = Math.abs(player.position.x - config.x) < config.width / 2 + 0.5;
        const inZoneZ = Math.abs(player.position.z - depositZoneZ) < 1.5;
        isInCashierZone = inZoneX && inZoneZ;

        // Deposit burgers when in zone
        if (
          isInCashierZone &&
          currentStackCount > 0 &&
          cashierBurgerStack.length < config.maxBurgers
        ) {
          cashierDepositTimer += deltaTime;

          if (cashierDepositTimer >= CASHIER_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
            cashierDepositTimer = 0;
            window.gameConfig.tutorialHasStockedCashier = true;

            if (playerStack.length > 0) {
              // Remove from player stack
              const item = playerStack.pop();
              const menuItem = item.userData.menuItem;
              // Get the menu item data
              player.remove(item);
              currentStackCount = playerStack.length;
              updateStackUI();

              // Throw burger to cashier tray
              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                z: player.position.z,
              };

              const trayX = config.x - config.width / 2 + 1.5;
              const targetPos = {
                x: trayX,
                y: 1.5,
                z: config.z,
              };

              createFlyingItem(
                startPos,
                targetPos,
                'burger',
                () => {
                  addBurgerToCashier(menuItem);
                  // Pass the menu item
                  playSound('pickup_sound');
                  updateCashierUI();
                },
                true
              );

              // Dispose of original item
              item.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                    child.material.forEach((mat) => mat.dispose());
                  } else {
                    child.material.dispose();
                  }
                }
              });
            }
          }
        } else {
          cashierDepositTimer = 0;
        }

        // Animate glow
        if (cashierStallGlow) {
          const pulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
          cashierStallGlow.scale.set(pulse, 1, pulse);

          // Change color based on state
          if (cashierBurgerStack.length === 0) {
            cashierStallGlow.material.color.setHex(0xe74c3c);
            // Red when empty
          } else if (cashierBurgerStack.length >= config.maxBurgers) {
            cashierStallGlow.material.color.setHex(0xf39c12);
            // Orange when full
          } else {
            cashierStallGlow.material.color.setHex(0x27ae60);
            // Green when accepting
          }
        }

        // Animate menu burger
        const menuBurger = cashierStallMesh.userData.menuBurger;
        if (menuBurger) {
          menuBurger.rotation.y += deltaTime * 1.5;
        }

        // Animate hired cashier staff with squishy feel
        if (hiredStaffMesh && hiredStaffMesh.userData.squishState) {
          const squish = hiredStaffMesh.userData.squishState;
          const now = Date.now();

          // Idle breathing/working animation
          const breathe = Math.sin(now * 0.004);

          // When serving customers, add extra bounce
          if (cashierServeTimer > 0 && cashierServeTimer < 0.3) {
            squish.targetScaleY = 0.9 + Math.sin(now * 0.02) * 0.1;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.1 - Math.sin(now * 0.02) * 0.1;
            switchAnimation(hiredStaffMesh, 'interact');
          } else {
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + breathe * 0.04;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - breathe * 0.03;
            switchAnimation(hiredStaffMesh, 'idle');
          }

          // Apply squish
          const squishSpeed = 10 * deltaTime;
          squish.scaleY += (squish.targetScaleY - squish.scaleY) * squishSpeed;
          squish.scaleXZ += (squish.targetScaleXZ - squish.scaleXZ) * squishSpeed;
          hiredStaffMesh.scale.set(squish.scaleXZ, squish.scaleY, squish.scaleXZ);

          // Subtle idle bob
          hiredStaffMesh.position.y = Math.sin(now * 0.003) * 0.02;
        }

        if (hiredStaffMesh2 && hiredStaffMesh2.userData.squishState) {
          const squish = hiredStaffMesh2.userData.squishState;
          const now = Date.now();
          const breathe = Math.sin(now * 0.004 + 1.7);

          if (cashierServeTimer2 > 0 && cashierServeTimer2 < 0.3) {
            squish.targetScaleY = 0.9 + Math.sin(now * 0.02) * 0.1;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.1 - Math.sin(now * 0.02) * 0.1;
            switchAnimation(hiredStaffMesh2, 'interact');
          } else {
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + breathe * 0.04;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - breathe * 0.03;
            switchAnimation(hiredStaffMesh2, 'idle');
          }

          const squishSpeed = 10 * deltaTime;
          squish.scaleY += (squish.targetScaleY - squish.scaleY) * squishSpeed;
          squish.scaleXZ += (squish.targetScaleXZ - squish.scaleXZ) * squishSpeed;
          hiredStaffMesh2.scale.set(squish.scaleXZ, squish.scaleY, squish.scaleXZ);

          hiredStaffMesh2.position.y = Math.sin(now * 0.003 + 1.2) * 0.02;
        }

        // Animate cash pile glow and icon
        if (cashierCashPileGlow) {
          const cashPilePulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
          cashierCashPileGlow.scale.set(cashPilePulse, 1, cashPilePulse);

          // Change glow color based on whether there's money to collect
          if (cashierCashPile.length > 0) {
            cashierCashPileGlow.material.color.setHex(0xffd700);
            // Gold when has money
            cashierCashPileGlow.material.opacity = 0.6;
          } else {
            cashierCashPileGlow.material.color.setHex(0x27ae60);
            // Green when empty
            cashierCashPileGlow.material.opacity = 0.3;
          }
        }

        const maxMoney =
          (config.maxMoney || 50) + (window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades?.cashpile || 0) * 20;
        if (cashierCashPileMesh && cashierCashPileMesh.userData.maxSprite) {
          const isMax = cashierCashPile.length >= maxMoney;
          cashierCashPileMesh.userData.maxSprite.visible = isMax;
          if (isMax) {
            const layer = Math.floor(cashierCashPile.length / 16);
            cashierCashPileMesh.userData.maxSprite.position.y =
              0.5 + layer * 0.12 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.005) * 0.1;
          }
        }

        // Animate dollar icon
        const dollarIcon = cashierCashPileMesh?.userData?.dollarIcon;
        if (dollarIcon) {
          dollarIcon.position.y = dollarIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          dollarIcon.rotation.y += deltaTime * 1.2;
        }
      }

      function updateDriveThruCarQueue(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth;
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;

        // Spawn new cars
        driveThruCarSpawnTimer += deltaTime;
        let activeCars = driveThruCarQueue.filter(
          (c) => c.state === 'waiting' || c.state === 'driving'
        ).length;

        const currentSpawnRate = isRushHour ? config.carSpawnRate / 2 : config.carSpawnRate;
        const maxCars = isRushHour ? config.maxCars + 2 : config.maxCars;

        if (driveThruCarSpawnTimer >= currentSpawnRate && activeCars < maxCars) {
          driveThruCarSpawnTimer = 0;
          spawnDriveThruCar();
        }

        const now = Date.now();

        // Update each car
        for (let i = driveThruCarQueue.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
          const car = driveThruCarQueue[i];
          const mesh = car.mesh;
          const squish = mesh.userData.squishState;

          if (car.state === 'driving') {
            const dz = car.targetZ - mesh.position.z;

            if (Math.abs(dz) > 0.1) {
              const speed = 8;
              mesh.position.z += Math.sign(dz) * speed * deltaTime;

              // Squish while moving
              const moveCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.008) * 0.5 + 0.5;
              squish.targetScaleY = 0.95 + moveCycle * 0.1;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.05 - moveCycle * 0.1;
            } else {
              car.state = 'waiting';
              mesh.position.z = car.targetZ;
              // Landing squish
              squish.scaleY = 0.9;
              squish.scaleXZ = 1.1;
            }
          } else if (car.state === 'waiting') {
            // Idle bounce
            mesh.position.y = Math.sin(now * 0.003 + i) * 0.02;

            const breathe = Math.sin(now * 0.004 + i * 0.5);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + breathe * 0.02;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - breathe * 0.015;

            car.waitTime += deltaTime;
          } else if (car.state === 'served') {
            car.waitTime += deltaTime;

            if (car.waitTime > 0.5) {
              removeDriveThruCar(car);
            }
          } else if (car.state === 'leaving') {
            const dz = car.targetZ - mesh.position.z;
            const speed = 12;
            mesh.position.z += Math.sign(dz) * speed * deltaTime;

            // Fast exit squish
            squish.targetScaleY = 0.9;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.1;

            if (mesh.position.z < -RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2 - 10) {
              scene.remove(mesh);
              mesh.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                  else child.material.dispose();
                }
              });
              driveThruCarQueue.splice(i, 1);
            }
          }

          // Apply squish
          const squishSpeed = 10 * deltaTime;
          squish.scaleY += (squish.targetScaleY - squish.scaleY) * squishSpeed;
          squish.scaleXZ += (squish.targetScaleXZ - squish.scaleXZ) * squishSpeed;
          mesh.scale.set(squish.scaleXZ, squish.scaleY, squish.scaleXZ);
        }

        // Serve first waiting car
        const staffConfig = window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile;
        const canServe =
          isInDriveThruZone ||
          (staffConfig && (staffConfig.staffHired || staffConfig.extraStaff1Hired || staffConfig.extraStaff2Hired));

        let firstWaitingCar = null;
        for (let i = 0; i < driveThruCarQueue.length; i++) {
          if (
            driveThruCarQueue[i].state === 'waiting' &&
            driveThruCarQueue[i].queuePosition === 0
          ) {
            firstWaitingCar = driveThruCarQueue[i];
            break;
          }
        }

        const maxMoney =
          (config.maxMoney || 50) + (window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades?.cashpile || 0) * 20;
        if (
          firstWaitingCar &&
          driveThruBurgerStack.length > 0 &&
          canServe &&
          driveThruCashPile.length < maxMoney
        ) {
          driveThruServeTimer += deltaTime;

          // Calculate dynamic serve time based on vault upgrade and staff count
          const vaultUpgrades = window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades || {};
          const serveBonus = 1 - (vaultUpgrades.serve || 0) * 0.1;
          let staffMultiplier = 1;
          if (staffConfig?.extraStaff2Hired) staffMultiplier = 0.5;
          else if (staffConfig?.extraStaff1Hired) staffMultiplier = 0.75;
          
          const currentServeTime = Math.max(0.1, config.serveTime * serveBonus * staffMultiplier);

          if (driveThruServeTimer >= currentServeTime) {
            driveThruServeTimer = 0;

            const servedMenuItem = removeBurgerFromDriveThru();

            firstWaitingCar.state = 'served';
            firstWaitingCar.waitTime = 0;
            firstWaitingCar.satisfied = true;

            // Calculate payment
            const vipConfig = window.gameConfig.vipCustomers || {
              tipMultiplier: 3,
            };
            const rushMultiplier = getRushHourTipMultiplier();
            const prestigeMultiplier = getPrestigeProfitMultiplier();
            const tipMultiplier = rushMultiplier * prestigeMultiplier;
            const basePrice =
              servedMenuItem && servedMenuItem.value
                ? servedMenuItem.value
                : window.gameConfig.resources.itemValue;
            const itemPrice = basePrice * tipMultiplier;
            const paperMoneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
            const billCount = Math.ceil(itemPrice / paperMoneyValue);

            // Spawn money bills
            for (let billIndex = 0; billIndex < billCount; billIndex++) {
              setTimeout(() => {
                const offsetX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
                const offsetZ = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;

                const moneyStartPos = {
                  x: firstWaitingCar.mesh.position.x + offsetX,
                  y: 1.5 + billIndex * 0.15,
                  z: firstWaitingCar.mesh.position.z + offsetZ,
                };
                
                // Target the player/currency icon
                const targetPos = {
                  x: player.position.x,
                  y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + (playerStack.length + moneyStack.length) * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                  z: player.position.z,
                };

                createFlyingItem(
                  moneyStartPos,
                  targetPos,
                  'money',
                  () => {
                    const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
                    modifyVaultBalance(moneyValue);
                  },
                  true
                );

                if (billIndex === 0) {
                  playSound('sell_sound');
                }
              }, billIndex * 80);
            }

            // Move other cars forward
            for (let j = 0; j < driveThruCarQueue.length; j++) {
              const c = driveThruCarQueue[j];
              if (c !== firstWaitingCar && (c.state === 'waiting' || c.state === 'driving')) {
                c.queuePosition--;
                c.targetZ = config.z + config.depth / 2 + 3 + c.queuePosition * CAR_SPACING;
                c.state = 'driving';
              }
            }
          }
        } else {
          driveThruServeTimer = 0;
        }
      }

      function createTrashBin() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.trashBin;
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;

        const x = config.x || 18;
        const z = config.z || 5;
        const radius = config.radius || 2;

        // Create simple bucket trash bin
        const binGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Simple bucket body (wider at top, narrower at bottom)
        const binGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(1.0, 0.7, 1.8, 16);
        const binMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x808080,
          // Simple gray
          roughness: 0.7,
          metalness: 0.1,
        });
        const binBody = new THREE.Mesh(binGeometry, binMaterial);
        binBody.position.y = 0.9;
        binBody.castShadow = true;
        binBody.receiveShadow = true;
        binGroup.add(binBody);

        // Inner darkness (to show it's hollow)
        const innerGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.9, 0.6, 0.1, 16);
        const innerMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x333333,
          roughness: 0.9,
        });
        const inner = new THREE.Mesh(innerGeometry, innerMaterial);
        inner.position.y = 1.764;
        binGroup.add(inner);

        binGroup.position.set(x, 0, z);
        scene.add(binGroup);
        // apply rotation from config if specified (degrees)
        binGroup.rotation.y = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(config.rotation || 0);
        trashBinMesh = binGroup;

        // Glow ring around bin
        const glowGeometry = new THREE.RingGeometry(radius - 0.3, radius, 32);
        const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
          color: config.color || 0x7f8c8d,
          side: THREE.DoubleSide,
          transparent: true,
          opacity: 0.5,
        });
        trashBinGlow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial);
        trashBinGlow.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
        trashBinGlow.position.set(x, 0.02, z);
        scene.add(trashBinGlow);

        // Create floating 🗑️ emoji using canvas texture
        const emojiCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        emojiCanvas.width = 128;
        emojiCanvas.height = 128;
        const emojiCtx = emojiCanvas.getContext('2d');
        emojiCtx.font = '100px Arial';
        emojiCtx.textAlign = 'center';
        emojiCtx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        emojiCtx.fillText('🗑️', 64, 64);

        const emojiTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(emojiCanvas);
        emojiTexture.minFilter = THREE.LinearFilter;

        const emojiGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.5, 1.5);
        const emojiMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
          map: emojiTexture,
          transparent: true,
          side: THREE.DoubleSide,
          depthWrite: false,
        });
        const emojiMesh = new THREE.Mesh(emojiGeometry, emojiMaterial);
        emojiMesh.position.set(x, 2.5, z);
        emojiMesh.userData.baseY = 2.5;
        scene.add(emojiMesh);

        trashBinMesh.userData.trashIcon = emojiMesh;
      }

      function createBankVault() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.bankVault;
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;

        // Only show vault if unlocked
        const vaultTileConfig = window.gameConfig.vaultTile;
        if (vaultTileConfig && !vaultTileConfig.unlocked) return;

        const vaultToggle = document.getElementById('vault-toggle');
        if (vaultToggle) vaultToggle.style.display = 'flex';

        const x = config.x;
        const z = config.z;

        // Main vault building
        const vaultGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Vault base (solid foundation)
        const baseGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(config.width + 0.5, 0.3, config.depth + 0.5);
        const baseMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x1a252f,
          roughness: 0.3,
          metalness: 0.5,
        });
        const base = new THREE.Mesh(baseGeometry, baseMaterial);
        base.position.y = 0.15;
        base.castShadow = true;
        base.receiveShadow = true;
        vaultGroup.add(base);

        // Vault body (main structure)
        const bodyGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(config.width, 2.5, config.depth);
        const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x2c3e50,
          roughness: 0.4,
          metalness: 0.3,
        });
        const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial);
        body.position.y = 1.55;
        body.castShadow = true;
        body.receiveShadow = true;
        vaultGroup.add(body);

        // Vault door (circular, bank-style)
        const doorGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(1.2, 1.2, 0.3, 32);
        const doorMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x7f8c8d,
          roughness: 0.2,
          metalness: 0.8,
        });
        const door = new THREE.Mesh(doorGeometry, doorMaterial);
        door.rotation.x = Math.PI / 2;
        door.position.set(0, 1.5, config.depth / 2 + 0.1);
        door.castShadow = true;
        vaultGroup.add(door);

        // Door handle (wheel)
        const handleGeometry = new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.5, 0.08, 8, 16);
        const handleMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xf1c40f,
          roughness: 0.2,
          metalness: 0.7,
        });
        const handle = new THREE.Mesh(handleGeometry, handleMaterial);
        handle.position.set(0, 1.5, config.depth / 2 + 0.3);
        handle.castShadow = true;
        vaultGroup.add(handle);
        vaultGroup.userData.handle = handle;

        // Handle spokes
        for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
          const spokeGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08, 0.9, 0.08);
          const spoke = new THREE.Mesh(spokeGeometry, handleMaterial);
          spoke.rotation.z = (i * Math.PI) / 2;
          spoke.position.set(0, 1.5, config.depth / 2 + 0.3);
          vaultGroup.add(spoke);
        }

        // Vault roof
        const roofGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(config.width + 0.3, 0.2, config.depth + 0.3);
        const roofMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x1a252f,
          roughness: 0.3,
          metalness: 0.4,
        });
        const roof = new THREE.Mesh(roofGeometry, roofMaterial);
        roof.position.y = 2.9;
        roof.castShadow = true;
        vaultGroup.add(roof);

        // Gold bars decoration on top
        const goldBarGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.3, 0.15, 0.6);
        const goldBarMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xf1c40f,
          roughness: 0.2,
          metalness: 0.8,
          emissive: 0xf1c40f,
          emissiveIntensity: 0.1,
        });

        for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
          const goldBar = new THREE.Mesh(goldBarGeometry, goldBarMaterial);
          goldBar.position.set(-0.5 + i * 0.5, 3.1, 0);
          goldBar.castShadow = true;
          vaultGroup.add(goldBar);
        }

        // "BANK" sign
        const signGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2, 0.6, 0.1);
        const signMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xf1c40f,
          roughness: 0.3,
          emissive: 0xf1c40f,
          emissiveIntensity: 0.2,
        });
        const sign = new THREE.Mesh(signGeometry, signMaterial);
        sign.position.set(0, 3.5, config.depth / 2);
        sign.castShadow = true;
        vaultGroup.add(sign);

        vaultGroup.position.set(x, 0, z);
        scene.add(vaultGroup);
        // apply rotation from config if specified (degrees)
        vaultGroup.rotation.y = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(config.rotation || 0);
        bankVaultMesh = vaultGroup;

        // Glow zone for player deposit area
        const glowGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(config.width + 2, 0.05, config.depth + 2);
        const glowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
          color: 0xf1c40f,
          transparent: true,
          opacity: 0.4,
        });
        bankVaultGlow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeometry, glowMaterial);
        bankVaultGlow.position.set(x, 0.02, z + config.depth / 2 + 1.5);
        scene.add(bankVaultGlow);

        // Create floating 🏦 emoji
        const emojiCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        emojiCanvas.width = 128;
        emojiCanvas.height = 128;
        const emojiCtx = emojiCanvas.getContext('2d');
        emojiCtx.font = '90px Arial';
        emojiCtx.textAlign = 'center';
        emojiCtx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        emojiCtx.fillText('🏦', 64, 64);

        const emojiTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(emojiCanvas);
        emojiTexture.minFilter = THREE.LinearFilter;

        const emojiGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(2, 2);
        const emojiMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
          map: emojiTexture,
          transparent: true,
          side: THREE.DoubleSide,
          depthWrite: false,
        });
        const emojiMesh = new THREE.Mesh(emojiGeometry, emojiMaterial);
        emojiMesh.position.set(x, 4.5, z);
        emojiMesh.userData.baseY = 4.5;
        scene.add(emojiMesh);

        bankVaultMesh.userData.vaultIcon = emojiMesh;

      function createStaffHireTile() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.staffHireTile;
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;

        config.cost = config.hireCost;

        // Use shared createBaseTile function
        const result = createBaseTile(config);
        staffHireTileMesh = result.tileMesh;
        staffHireTileGlow = result.glowMesh;

        // Update progress and cost display based on current deposit
        createTileCostDisplay(staffHireTileMesh, config);
        updateStaffHireProgress();
        updateStaffHireCostDisplay();

        // If staff already hired, create hired staff visual at cashier
        if (config.staffHired) {
          createHiredStaffAtCashier();
        }
      }

      function updateStaffHireProgress() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.staffHireTile;
        if (!config || !staffHireTileMesh) return;
        const extraCost = config.extraHireCost || Math.max(150, Math.round(config.hireCost * 1.5));
        const targetCost = config.staffHired ? extraCost : config.hireCost;
        const tempConfig = { ...config, cost: targetCost, moneyDeposited: config.moneyDeposited || 0 };
        updateTileProgress(staffHireTileMesh, tempConfig);
      }

      function updateStaffHireCostDisplay() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.staffHireTile;
        if (!config || !staffHireTileMesh) return;
        const extraCost = config.extraHireCost || Math.max(150, Math.round(config.hireCost * 1.5));
        const targetCost = config.staffHired ? extraCost : config.hireCost;
        const tempConfig = { ...config, cost: targetCost, moneyDeposited: config.moneyDeposited || 0 };
        updateUnlockTileCostDisplay(staffHireTileMesh, tempConfig);
      }

      function createHiredStaffAtCashier() {
        const cashierConfig = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
        if (!cashierConfig || cashierConfig.deleted) return;

        // Remove existing staff if any
        if (hiredStaffMesh) {
          scene.remove(hiredStaffMesh);
          hiredStaffMesh = null;
        }
        if (hiredStaffMesh2) {
          scene.remove(hiredStaffMesh2);
          hiredStaffMesh2 = null;
        }

        // Create staff member using the same model as player (green apron for hired status)
        const staffGroup = createStaffMesh(0x27ae60);

        // Position behind cashier counter (left side)
        staffGroup.position.set(
          cashierConfig.x - 1.4,
          0,
          cashierConfig.z - cashierConfig.depth / 2 - 1.2
        );
        staffGroup.rotation.y = 0;
        // Face customers

        scene.add(staffGroup);
        hiredStaffMesh = staffGroup;

        // Optional second cashier staff
        if (window.gameConfig.staffHireTile && window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.extraStaffHired) {
          const staffGroup2 = createStaffMesh(0x27ae60);
          staffGroup2.position.set(
            cashierConfig.x + 1.4,
            0,
            cashierConfig.z - cashierConfig.depth / 2 - 1.2
          );
          staffGroup2.rotation.y = 0;
          scene.add(staffGroup2);
          hiredStaffMesh2 = staffGroup2;
        }

        // Update staff icon on hire tile to show hired
        if (staffHireTileMesh && staffHireTileMesh.userData.staffIcon) {
          const icon = staffHireTileMesh.userData.staffIcon;
          // Change body color to green
          if (icon.children[0]) {
            icon.children[0].material.color.setHex(0x27ae60);
          }
          // Remove dollar sign if exists
          if (icon.children.length > 2) {
            icon.remove(icon.children[2]);
          }
        }
      }
