              color: bunColor,
              roughness: 0.7,
            })
          );
          burger.position.y = 0.2;
          burger.castShadow = true;
          itemGroup.add(burger);
        }

        itemGroup.position.copy(position);
        itemGroup.position.y = 0.1;
        itemGroup.rotation.y = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;

        // Add physics-like properties
        itemGroup.userData.velocity = {
          x: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 3,
          z: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 3,
        };
        itemGroup.userData.collected = false;

        scene.add(itemGroup);
        groundItems.push(itemGroup);

        return itemGroup;
      }

      function addToStack(menuItem = null) {
        const stackY = PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT;
        const food = createStackItem(menuItem);
        food.position.y = stackY;
        player.add(food);
        playerStack.push(food);
        currentStackCount = playerStack.length;
        updateStackUI();
        playSound('pickup_sound');
      }

      function removeFromStack() {
        if (playerStack.length > 0) {
          const item = playerStack.pop();
          player.remove(item);

          // Dispose of all children geometries and materials
          item.traverse((child) => {
            if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
            if (child.material) {
              if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                child.material.forEach((mat) => mat.dispose());
              } else {
                child.material.dispose();
              }
            }
          });

          currentStackCount = playerStack.length;
          updateStackUI();
          return true;
        }
        return false;
      }

      // ============================================
      // 3D MODEL LOADING
      // ============================================

      async function loadStickmanModel() {
        // Support asset IDs from the host asset map as well as full URLs.
        let STICKMAN_MODEL_URL = window.gameConfig.stickmanModelURL;

        // If the config value looks like an asset id (no protocol), try resolving via lib.getAsset
        try {
          if (STICKMAN_MODEL_URL && typeof STICKMAN_MODEL_URL === 'string' && !/^https?:\/\//i.test(STICKMAN_MODEL_URL)) {
            const assetInfo = lib.getAsset(STICKMAN_MODEL_URL);
            if (assetInfo && assetInfo.url) {
              STICKMAN_MODEL_URL = assetInfo.url;
            }
          }
        } catch (e) {
          lib.log('Error resolving stickman asset id: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e));
        }

        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
          if (stickmanModelLoaded && stickmanModelTemplate) {
            resolve(stickmanModelTemplate);
            return;
          }

          if (!gltfLoader) {
            gltfLoader = new THREE.GLTFLoader();
          }
          if (!dracoLoader) {
            dracoLoader = new THREE.DRACOLoader();
            dracoLoader.setDecoderPath('https://www.gstatic.com/draco/v1/decoders/');
          }
          gltfLoader.setDRACOLoader(dracoLoader);

          gltfLoader.load(
            STICKMAN_MODEL_URL,
            (gltf) => {
              stickmanModelTemplate = gltf;
              stickmanModelLoaded = true;
              lib.log('Stickman model loaded successfully');
              resolve(gltf);
            },
            (progress) => {
              // Loading progress
            },
            (error) => {
              lib.log('Error loading stickman model: ' + (error && error.message ? error.message : error));
              reject(error);
            }
          );
        });
      }

      function createCrownHat() {
        // Create a royal crown for VIP customers
        const crownGroup = new THREE.Group();

        const crownMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xffd700,
          roughness: 0.2,
          metalness: 0.8,
          emissive: 0xffaa00,
          emissiveIntensity: 0.3,
        });

        // Crown base
        const crownBase = new THREE.Mesh(
          new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.35, 0.38, 0.18, 16),
          crownMaterial
        );
        crownBase.position.y = 0;
        crownBase.castShadow = true;
        crownGroup.add(crownBase);

        // Crown points (5 tall points around the rim)
        for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
          const angle = (i / 5) * Math.PI * 2;
          const point = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.1, 0.35, 8), crownMaterial);
          point.position.set(Math.cos(angle) * 0.28, 0.25, Math.sin(angle) * 0.28);
          point.castShadow = true;
          crownGroup.add(point);
        }

        // Gems on each point (alternating red and blue)
        const gemColors = [0xe74c3c, 0x3498db, 0xe74c3c, 0x9b59b6, 0x2ecc71];
        for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
          const angle = (i / 5) * Math.PI * 2;
          const gemMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: gemColors[i],
            roughness: 0.1,
            metalness: 0.5,
            emissive: gemColors[i],
            emissiveIntensity: 0.4,
          });
          const gem = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.06, 0), gemMaterial);
          gem.position.set(Math.cos(angle) * 0.28, 0.45, Math.sin(angle) * 0.28);
          gem.rotation.z = Math.PI / 4;
          crownGroup.add(gem);
        }

        // Center large gem on front
        const centerGemMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xe74c3c,
          roughness: 0.1,
          metalness: 0.5,
          emissive: 0xe74c3c,
          emissiveIntensity: 0.5,
        });
        const centerGem = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.1, 0), centerGemMaterial);
        centerGem.position.set(0, 0.1, 0.35);
        centerGem.rotation.z = Math.PI / 4;
        crownGroup.add(centerGem);

        return crownGroup;
      }

      function createMcDonaldsHat(isPlayer = false) {
        // Create a McDonald's crew visor cap
        const hatGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Main cap body (red)
        const capGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.35, 16, 8, 0, Math.PI * 2, 0, Math.PI / 2);
        const capMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x2b2428,
          // McDonald's red
          roughness: 0.5,
          metalness: 0.1,
        });
        const cap = new THREE.Mesh(capGeometry, capMaterial);
        cap.scale.set(1, 0.6, 1);
        cap.position.y = 0;
        cap.position.z = -0.067;
        cap.castShadow = true;
        hatGroup.add(cap);

        // Visor/brim (also red)
        const visorGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(
          0.4,
          0.45,
          0.06,
          16,
          1,
          false,
          -Math.PI / 2,
          Math.PI
        );
        const visorMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x2b2428,
          roughness: 0.4,
          metalness: 0.1,
        });
        const visor = new THREE.Mesh(visorGeometry, visorMaterial);
        visor.rotation.x = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(8.37);
        visor.rotation.z = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(180);
        visor.position.set(0, -0.023, 0.098);
        visor.scale.set(0.692, 1, 0.776);
        visor.castShadow = true;
        hatGroup.add(visor);

        // Golden arches "M" logo
        const archMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xffc72c,
          // McDonald's gold
          roughness: 0.3,
          metalness: 0.4,
          emissive: 0xffa500,
          emissiveIntensity: 0.2,
        });

        // Left arch of M
        const leftArch = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.06, 0.15, 0.02), archMaterial);
        leftArch.position.set(-0.08, 0.05, 0.32);
        leftArch.rotation.z = -0.2;
        hatGroup.add(leftArch);

        // Right arch of M
        const rightArch = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.06, 0.15, 0.02), archMaterial);
        rightArch.position.set(0.08, 0.05, 0.32);
        rightArch.rotation.z = 0.2;
        hatGroup.add(rightArch);

        // Middle connection
        const middleBar = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.04, 0.06, 0.02), archMaterial);
        middleBar.position.set(0, 0.02, 0.32);
        hatGroup.add(middleBar);

        hatGroup.position.set(0, 0, 0.082);
        hatGroup.scale.set(0.75, 0.75, 0.75);
        return hatGroup;
      }

      // function createStickmanInstance(color = 0xFFFFFF) {
      function createStickmanInstance() {
        if (!stickmanModelLoaded || !stickmanModelTemplate) {
          // Fallback to simple mesh if model not loaded
          return createFallbackCharacter(color);
        }

        const color = 0xfff0ff;

        const characterGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Clone the model
        const model =
          typeof THREE.SkeletonUtils !== 'undefined'
            ? THREE.SkeletonUtils.clone(stickmanModelTemplate.scene)
            : stickmanModelTemplate.scene.clone();

        // Auto-scale to height of ~2.0
        const box = new THREE.Box3().setFromObject(stickmanModelTemplate.scene);
        const size = box.getSize(new THREE.Vector3());
        if (size.y > 0.1) {
          const targetScale = 3.0 / size.y;
          model.scale.set(targetScale, targetScale, targetScale);
        } else {
          model.scale.set(1.5, 1.5, 1.5);
        }
        model.position.y = -0.15;

        // Apply color tint to the model
        model.traverse((child) => {
          if (child.isMesh) {
            child.castShadow = true;
            child.receiveShadow = true;
            // Create a reliable material to avoid black rendering
            child.material = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
              color: color === 0xffffff ? 0xdddddd : color,
              roughness: 0.6,
              metalness: 0.1,
              skinning: !!child.isSkinnedMesh,
            });
          }
        });

        characterGroup.add(model);

        // Add McDonald's hat for staff members (not player)
        if (color !== 0xffffff) {
          const mcHat = createMcDonaldsHat();
          // mcHat.position.y = 2.4*1.75; // Position on top of head
          // characterGroup.add(mcHat);
          characterGroup.userData.mcHat = mcHat;

          // find the head bone or mesh
          const head = model.getObjectByName('head_leaf');
          // name depends on your model
          // console.log(head);
          // attach hat to head
          if (head) {
            head.add(mcHat);

            // position hat relative to head
            mcHat.position.set(0, 0.3, 0);
          }
        }

        // Setup animation mixer if animations exist
        let mixer = null;
        const animActions = {};

        if (stickmanModelTemplate.animations && stickmanModelTemplate.animations.length > 0) {
          mixer = new THREE.AnimationMixer(model);
          mixer.timeScale = 3.0;
          const clips = stickmanModelTemplate.animations;

          // Find and store specific animation clips by name
          clips.forEach((clip) => {
            const clipName = clip.name.toLowerCase();
            // console.log(clipName);
            const action = mixer.clipAction(clip);

            // idle_foldarms_loop
            // idle_loop
            // interact
            // jog_fwd_loop
            // walk_carry_loop
            // walk_formal_loop
            if (clipName.includes('idle_foldarms_loop') || clipName.includes('idle_foldarms')) {
              animActions.idleFoldArms = action;
            } else if (clipName.includes('idle_loop')) {
              animActions.idle = action;
            } else if (clipName.includes('walk_carry_loop') || clipName.includes('walk_carry')) {
              animActions.walkCarry = action;
            } else if (clipName.includes('jog_fwd_loop')) {
              animActions.run = action;
            } else if (clipName.includes('walk_formal_loop') || clipName.includes('walk_formal')) {
              animActions.walk = action;
            } else if (
              clipName.includes('interact') ||
              clipName.includes('action') ||
              clipName.includes('work')
            ) {
              animActions.interact = action;
            }
          });

          // Fallback: if specific animations not found, use first clip for all
          if (!animActions.idle && clips.length > 0) {
            animActions.idle = mixer.clipAction(clips[0]);
          }
          if (!animActions.run) {
            animActions.run = animActions.idle;
          }
          if (!animActions.walk) {
            animActions.walk = animActions.run || animActions.idle;
          }
          if (!animActions.interact) {
            animActions.interact = animActions.idle;
          }
          if (!animActions.walkCarry) {
            animActions.walkCarry = animActions.run || animActions.idle;
          }
          if (!animActions.idleFoldArms) {
            animActions.idleFoldArms = animActions.idle;
          }

          // Start with idle animation
          if (animActions.idle) {
            animActions.idle.play();
          }

          animationMixers.push(mixer);
          characterGroup.userData.mixer = mixer;
          characterGroup.userData.animations = clips;
          characterGroup.userData.animActions = animActions;
          characterGroup.userData.currentAnim = 'idle';
        }

        // Initialize squish state for squishy animation
        characterGroup.userData.squishState = {
          scaleY: 1,
          scaleXZ: 1,
          targetScaleY: 1,
          targetScaleXZ: 1,
        };
        characterGroup.userData.model = model;

        return characterGroup;
      }

      function switchAnimation(characterGroup, animName) {
        if (!characterGroup || !characterGroup.userData.animActions) return;

        const actions = characterGroup.userData.animActions;
        const currentAnim = characterGroup.userData.currentAnim;

        if (currentAnim === animName) return;
        // Already playing this animation

        const newAction = actions[animName];
        const oldAction = actions[currentAnim];

        if (!newAction) return;

        // Crossfade to new animation
        if (oldAction) {
          newAction.reset();
          newAction.setEffectiveTimeScale(1);
          newAction.setEffectiveWeight(1);
          newAction.crossFadeFrom(oldAction, 0.2, true);
          newAction.play();
        } else {
          newAction.play();
        }

        characterGroup.userData.currentAnim = animName;
      }

      function createFallbackCharacter(color = 0xffffff) {
        // Fallback simple character if model fails to load
        const characterGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Body
        const bodyGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.45, 0.55, 1.3, 16);
        const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: color,
          roughness: 0.5,
          metalness: 0.1,
        });
        const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial);
        body.position.y = 0.65;
        body.castShadow = true;
        characterGroup.add(body);

        // Head
        const headGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.4, 16, 16);
        const headMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xffdbac,
          roughness: 0.6,
        });
        const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeometry, headMaterial);
        head.position.y = 1.6;
        head.castShadow = true;
        characterGroup.add(head);

        // Eyes
        const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.07, 8, 8);
        const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
          color: 0x333333,
        });

        const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial);
        leftEye.position.set(-0.14, 1.65, 0.32);
        characterGroup.add(leftEye);

        const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial);
        rightEye.position.set(0.14, 1.65, 0.32);
        characterGroup.add(rightEye);

        characterGroup.userData.squishState = {
          scaleY: 1,
          scaleXZ: 1,
          targetScaleY: 1,
          targetScaleXZ: 1,
        };

        return characterGroup;
      }

      function updateAnimationMixers(deltaTime) {
        for (let i = 0; i < animationMixers.length; i++) {
          if (animationMixers[i]) {
            animationMixers[i].update(deltaTime);
          }
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // AUDIO SYSTEM
      // ============================================

      async function initAudio() {
        try {
          audioContext = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();

          // Create gain node for music
          musicGainNode = audioContext.createGain();
          musicGainNode.connect(audioContext.destination);
          musicGainNode.gain.value = 0.3;
          // Audio assets will be lazy-loaded when played
        } catch (e) {
          lib.log('Audio initialization failed: ' + e.message);
        }
      }

      let lastCollectSoundTime = 0;
      let collectSoundPitch = 1.0;

      async function playSound(soundId) {
        if (!audioContext || !soundId) return;

        // Apply happiness bonus from decorations to sounds for "vibe"
        const signLevel = window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades?.signs?.level || 0;
        const pitchShift = signLevel * 0.02;

        // Lazy load audio if not already in buffer
        if (!audioBuffers[soundId]) {
          const asset = lib.getAsset(soundId);
          if (asset && asset.url) {
            try {
              const response = await fetch(asset.url);
              const arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();
              audioBuffers[soundId] = await audioContext.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer);
            } catch (e) {
              lib.log('Failed to load audio: ' + soundId);
              return;
            }
          } else {
            lib.log('Audio asset not found: ' + soundId);
            return;
          }
        }

        try {
          if (audioContext.state === 'suspended') {
            audioContext.resume();
          }

          const source = audioContext.createBufferSource();
          source.buffer = audioBuffers[soundId];

          if (soundId === 'pickup_sound') {
              const pitchVariance = window.gameConfig.settings.collectSoundPitchVariance ?? 0;
              if (pitchVariance > 0) {
                  const randomOffset = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * pitchVariance;
                  source.playbackRate.value = Math.max(0.5, 1 + randomOffset);
              }
          }

          if (soundId === 'collect_sound') {
            const now = Date.now();
            if (now - lastCollectSoundTime < 1000) {
              collectSoundPitch = Math.min(3.0, collectSoundPitch + 0.1);
            } else {
              collectSoundPitch = 1.0;
            }
            lastCollectSoundTime = now;
            source.playbackRate.value = collectSoundPitch;
          }

          const gainNode = audioContext.createGain();
          gainNode.gain.value = 0.5;

          source.playbackRate.value *= (1 + pitchShift);

          source.connect(gainNode);
          gainNode.connect(audioContext.destination);
          source.start(0);
        } catch (e) {
          // Silently fail
        }
      }

      async function playMusic() {
        if (!audioContext || !window.gameConfig.settings.musicEnabled) return;

        // Lazy load music if not already in buffer
        if (!audioBuffers['background_music']) {
          const asset = lib.getAsset('background_music');
          if (asset && asset.url) {
            try {
              const response = await fetch(asset.url);
              const arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();
              audioBuffers['background_music'] = await audioContext.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer);
            } catch (e) {
              lib.log('Failed to load background music: ' + e);
              return;
            }
          } else {
            lib.log('Background music asset not found.');
            return;
          }
        }

        try {
          if (audioContext.state === 'suspended') {
            audioContext.resume();
          }

          if (musicSource) {
            musicSource.stop();
          }

          musicSource = audioContext.createBufferSource();
          musicSource.buffer = audioBuffers['background_music'];
          musicSource.loop = true;
          musicSource.connect(musicGainNode);
          musicSource.start(0);
        } catch (e) {
          lib.log('Failed to play music: ' + e.message);
        }
      }

      function stopMusic() {
        if (musicSource) {
          try {
            musicSource.stop();
          } catch (e) {}
          musicSource = null;
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // INPUT HANDLING
      // ============================================

      function setupKeyboardInput() {
        window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
          if (gameMode === 'edit') return;
          const key = e.key.toLowerCase();
          if (
            ['w', 'a', 's', 'd', 'arrowup', 'arrowdown', 'arrowleft', 'arrowright'].includes(key)
          ) {
            e.preventDefault();
            keys[key] = true;
          }
        });

        window.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
          const key = e.key.toLowerCase();
          keys[key] = false;
        });

        window.addEventListener('blur', () => {
          keys = {};
          inputVector = {
            x: 0,
            z: 0,
          };
        });
      }

      function setupTouchInput() {
        const joystickZone = document.getElementById('joystick-zone');
        const joystickBase = document.getElementById('joystick-base');
        const joystickStick = document.getElementById('joystick-stick');

        const maxRadius = 55;
        // Max movement radius for stick
        const deadZone = 8;

        // Get joystick center position (fixed position)
        function getJoystickCenter() {
          const rect = joystickBase.getBoundingClientRect();
          return {
            x: rect.left + rect.width / 2,
            y: rect.top + rect.height / 2,
          };
        }

        joystickZone.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
          if (gameMode === 'edit') return;
          e.preventDefault();

          const touch = e.changedTouches[0];
          joystickTouchId = touch.identifier;
          joystickActive = true;

          // Use fixed joystick center
          joystickCenter = getJoystickCenter();

          // Add active class for visual feedback
          joystickBase.classList.add('active');

          // Calculate initial stick position
          const dx = touch.clientX - joystickCenter.x;
          const dy = touch.clientY - joystickCenter.y;
          const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);

          let clampedX = dx;
          let clampedY = dy;

          if (distance > maxRadius) {
            clampedX = (dx / distance) * maxRadius;
            clampedY = (dy / distance) * maxRadius;
          }

          joystickStick.style.transform = `translate(${clampedX}px, ${clampedY}px)`;

          // Calculate input vector
          if (distance > deadZone) {
            const normalizedDistance = Math.min((distance - deadZone) / (maxRadius - deadZone), 1);
            const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
            inputVector.x = Math.cos(angle) * normalizedDistance;
            inputVector.z = Math.sin(angle) * normalizedDistance;
          }
        });

        joystickZone.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
          if (!joystickActive || gameMode === 'edit') return;
          e.preventDefault();

          let touch = null;
          for (let i = 0; i < e.changedTouches.length; i++) {
            if (e.changedTouches[i].identifier === joystickTouchId) {
              touch = e.changedTouches[i];
              break;
            }
          }

          if (!touch) return;

          const dx = touch.clientX - joystickCenter.x;
          const dy = touch.clientY - joystickCenter.y;
          const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);

          let clampedX = dx;
          let clampedY = dy;

          if (distance > maxRadius) {
            clampedX = (dx / distance) * maxRadius;
            clampedY = (dy / distance) * maxRadius;
          }

          joystickStick.style.transform = `translate(${clampedX}px, ${clampedY}px)`;

          // Calculate input vector with dead zone
          if (distance > deadZone) {
            const normalizedDistance = Math.min((distance - deadZone) / (maxRadius - deadZone), 1);
            const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
            inputVector.x = Math.cos(angle) * normalizedDistance;
            inputVector.z = Math.sin(angle) * normalizedDistance;
          } else {
            inputVector.x = 0;
            inputVector.z = 0;
          }
        });

        const endTouch = (e) => {
          for (let i = 0; i < e.changedTouches.length; i++) {
            if (e.changedTouches[i].identifier === joystickTouchId) {
              joystickActive = false;
              joystickTouchId = null;
              joystickBase.classList.remove('active');
              joystickStick.style.transform = 'translate(0, 0)';
              inputVector.x = 0;
              inputVector.z = 0;
              break;
            }
          }
        };
        joystickZone.addEventListener('touchend', endTouch);
        joystickZone.addEventListener('touchcancel', endTouch);
      }

      function updateInputFromKeyboard() {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        let kx = 0,
          kz = 0;

        if (keys['w'] || keys['arrowup']) kz -= 1;
        if (keys['s'] || keys['arrowdown']) kz += 1;
        if (keys['a'] || keys['arrowleft']) kx -= 1;
        if (keys['d'] || keys['arrowright']) kx += 1;

        // Normalize diagonal movement
        if (kx !== 0 || kz !== 0) {
          const length = Math.sqrt(kx * kx + kz * kz);
          inputVector.x = kx / length;
          inputVector.z = kz / length;
        } else if (!joystickActive) {
          inputVector.x = 0;
          inputVector.z = 0;
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // UI UPDATES
      // ============================================

      function lerp(a, b, t) {
        return a + (b - a) * t;
      }

      function formatCurrencyAbbrev(value) {
        const num = Number(value) || 0;
        const sign = num < 0 ? '-' : '';
        const abs = Math.abs(num);
        if (abs < 1000) return sign + Math.floor(abs).toString();
        const units = [
          {
            v: 1e12,
            s: 'T',
          },
          {
            v: 1e9,
            s: 'B',
          },
          {
            v: 1e6,
            s: 'M',
          },
        ];
        for (const u of units) {
          if (abs >= u.v) {
            const scaled = abs / u.v;
            const decimals = scaled >= 10 ? 0 : 1;
            return sign + scaled.toFixed(decimals).replace(/\.0$/, '') + u.s;
          }
        }
        return sign + Math.floor(abs).toString();
      }

      async function updateLeaderboardScore() {
        try {
          const response = await lib.addPlayerScoreToLeaderboard(totalMoneyGained, 10);
          if (response && response.success) {
            renderLeaderboard(response.entries, response.userRank);
          }
        } catch (error) {
          lib.log(`Failed to submit score to leaderboard: ${error.message}`);
        }
      }

      function scheduleLeaderboardUpdate() {
        if (leaderboardUpdateTimer) return;
        leaderboardUpdateTimer = setTimeout(() => {
          leaderboardUpdateTimer = null;
          updateLeaderboardScore();
        }, 1500);
      }

      function updateTotalMoneyGained(amount) {
        if (!Number.isFinite(amount) || amount <= 0) return;
        totalMoneyGained += amount;
        updateTotalMoneyUI();
        scheduleLeaderboardUpdate();
      }

      function updateTotalMoneyUI() {
        if (cachedDOMElements.totalMoney) {
          cachedDOMElements.totalMoney.textContent = '$' + formatCurrencyAbbrev(totalMoneyGained);
        }
      }

      function renderLeaderboard(entries, userRank) {
        const listEl = cachedDOMElements.leaderboardList;
        if (!listEl) return;
        listEl.innerHTML = '';
        entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
          const row = document.createElement('div');
          row.className = 'leaderboard-entry';
          const rank = document.createElement('span');
          rank.className = 'leaderboard-rank';
          rank.textContent = `#${index + 1}`;
          const name = document.createElement('span');
          name.textContent = entry.username || 'Anonymous';
          const score = document.createElement('span');
          score.textContent = '$' + formatCurrencyAbbrev(entry.score || 0);
          row.appendChild(rank);
          row.appendChild(name);
          row.appendChild(score);
          listEl.appendChild(row);
        });

        if (cachedDOMElements.leaderboardRank) {
          cachedDOMElements.leaderboardRank.textContent =
            userRank !== null && userRank !== undefined
              ? `Your Rank: #${userRank}`
              : 'Your Rank: Unranked';
        }
      }

      function updateCurrencyUI() {
        const el = cachedDOMElements.currencyValue;
        if (!el) return;
        el.textContent = formatCurrencyAbbrev(currentCurrency);
        el.classList.remove('currency-pop');
        void el.offsetWidth;
        // Trigger reflow
        el.classList.add('currency-pop');
      }

      function updateStackUI() {
        const count = cachedDOMElements.stackCount;
        const max = cachedDOMElements.stackMax;
        if (count) count.textContent = currentStackCount;
        if (max) max.textContent = getMaxCapacity();
      }

      function updateMoneyStackUI() {
        const count = cachedDOMElements.moneyCount;
        const max = cachedDOMElements.moneyMax;
        if (count) count.textContent = currentMoneyCount;
        if (max) max.textContent = MAX_MONEY_CAPACITY;
      }

      function updateCashierUI() {
        const cashierCount = cachedDOMElements.cashierCount;
        const cashierMax = cachedDOMElements.cashierMax;
        const customerCountEl = cachedDOMElements.customerCount;
        const cashierEarningsEl = cachedDOMElements.cashierEarnings;

        if (cashierCount && cashierMax && window.gameConfig.cashierStall) {
          cashierCount.textContent = cashierBurgerStack.length;
          cashierMax.textContent = window.gameConfig.cashierStall.maxBurgers;
        }

        if (customerCountEl) {
          let waitingCount = 0;
          for (let i = 0; i < customerQueue.length; i++) {
            const state = customerQueue[i].state;
            if (state === 'waiting' || state === 'walking') waitingCount++;
          }
          customerCountEl.textContent = waitingCount;
        }

        if (cashierEarningsEl) {
          cashierEarningsEl.textContent = cashierCashPile.length;
        }
      }

      function updateVaultUI() {
        const balanceEl = cachedDOMElements.vaultBalance;
        const balanceLargeEl = cachedDOMElements.vaultBalanceLarge;

        if (balanceEl) {
          balanceEl.textContent = formatCurrencyAbbrev(vaultBalance);
        }
        if (balanceLargeEl) {
          balanceLargeEl.textContent = formatCurrencyAbbrev(vaultBalance);
        }

        updateTotalMoneyUI();

        // Update vault upgrade buttons
        updateVaultUpgradeUI();

        // Update prestige UI
        updatePrestigeUI();
      }

      function updatePrestigeUI() {
        const prestige = window.gameConfig.prestige || {
          level: 0,
          baseCost: 5000,
          costMultiplier: 2.5,
          profitBonus: 0.1,
        };

        const levelEl = document.getElementById('prestige-level');
        const bonusEl = document.getElementById('prestige-bonus');
        const costEl = document.getElementById('prestige-cost');
        const btnEl = document.getElementById('prestige-btn');

        if (levelEl) {
          levelEl.textContent = prestige.level;
        }

        if (bonusEl) {
          const totalBonus = Math.round(prestige.level * prestige.profitBonus * 100);
          bonusEl.textContent = totalBonus;
        }

        const prestigeCost = Math.floor(
          prestige.baseCost * Math.pow(prestige.costMultiplier, prestige.level)
        );

        if (costEl) {
          costEl.textContent = formatCurrencyAbbrev(prestigeCost);
        }

        if (btnEl) {
          btnEl.disabled = vaultBalance < prestigeCost;
        }
      }

      function getPrestigeProfitMultiplier() {
        const prestige = window.gameConfig.prestige || {
          level: 0,
          profitBonus: 0.1,
        };
        const tableBonus = 1 + (window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades?.tables?.level || 0) * 0.05;
        return (1 + prestige.level * prestige.profitBonus) * tableBonus;
      }

      function performPrestige() {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const prestige = window.gameConfig.prestige || {
          level: 0,
          baseCost: 5000,
          costMultiplier: 2.5,
          profitBonus: 0.1,
        };
        const prestigeCost = Math.floor(
          prestige.baseCost * Math.pow(prestige.costMultiplier, prestige.level)
        );

        if (vaultBalance < prestigeCost) {
          return;
        }

        // Deduct cost from vault
        modifyVaultBalance(-prestigeCost);

        // Increment prestige level (this persists)
        prestige.level++;
        window.gameConfig.prestige = prestige;

        // Show prestige notification
        showPrestigeNotification(prestige.level);

        // Close vault panel
        const vaultPanel = document.getElementById('vault-panel');
        if (vaultPanel) {
          vaultPanel.classList.remove('open');
        }

        // Reset everything after a brief delay for the notification
        setTimeout(() => {
          resetForPrestige();
        }, 1500);
      }

      function showPrestigeNotification(newLevel) {
        const notification = document.getElementById('prestige-notification');
        if (!notification) return;

        const bonusPercent = Math.round(
          newLevel * (window.gameConfig.prestige.profitBonus || 0.1) * 100
        );
        const subtitleEl = notification.querySelector('.notification-subtitle');
        if (subtitleEl) {
          subtitleEl.textContent = `+${bonusPercent}% Profit Bonus!`;
        }

        notification.classList.add('show');
        playSound('upgrade_sound');

        // Hide after delay
        setTimeout(() => {
          notification.classList.remove('show');
        }, 3000);
      }

      function resetForPrestige() {
        // ====== RESET CURRENCY ======
        currentCurrency = 0;
        window.gameConfig.currency = 0;
        window.gameConfig.tutorialStep = 0;
        tutorialCompleteShown = false;
        tutorialCompleteTimer = 0;
        const tutorialOverlay = document.getElementById('tutorial-complete');
        if (tutorialOverlay) tutorialOverlay.classList.remove('show');

        // Reset vault balance to 0 (prestige cost already deducted)
        vaultBalance = 0;
        window.gameConfig.bankVault.balance = 0;

        // ====== RESET UPGRADES ======
        window.gameConfig.upgrades.capacity.level = 0;
        window.gameConfig.upgrades.speed.level = 0;
        window.gameConfig.upgrades.collection.level = 0;

        // Reset vault upgrades
        window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades = {
          earnings: 0,
          capacity: 0,
          tips: 0,
          speed: 0,
          cook: 0,
          serve: 0,
          cashpile: 0,
        };

        // ====== RESET CASHIER TILE ======
        if (window.gameConfig.cashierTile) {
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked = false;
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
        }

        // ====== RESET GRILL TILE ======
        if (window.gameConfig.grillTile) {
          window.gameConfig.grillTile.unlocked = false;
          window.gameConfig.grillTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.driveThruTile) {
          window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.unlocked = false;
          window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.trashTile) {
          window.gameConfig.trashTile.unlocked = false;
          window.gameConfig.trashTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.vaultTile) {
          window.gameConfig.vaultTile.unlocked = false;
          window.gameConfig.vaultTile.moneyDeposited = 0;

          // Close vault panel if it's open
          const vaultPanel = document.getElementById('vault-panel');
          if (vaultPanel) vaultPanel.classList.remove('open');
        }

        if (window.gameConfig.fountainTile) {
          window.gameConfig.fountainTile.unlocked = false;
          window.gameConfig.fountainTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
        }
        if (fountainMesh) {
          scene.remove(fountainMesh);
          fountainMesh = null;
        }

        // ====== RESET STAFF ======
        // Cashier staff
        if (window.gameConfig.staffHireTile) {
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired = false;
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
        }
        if (hiredStaffMesh) {
          scene.remove(hiredStaffMesh);
          hiredStaffMesh = null;
        }

        // Cleaner staff
        if (window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile) {
          window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.staffHired = false;
          window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
        }
        if (hiredCleanerMesh) {
          scene.remove(hiredCleanerMesh);
          hiredCleanerMesh = null;
        }
        cleanerStaffAI = null;

        // Vault collector staff
        if (window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile) {
          window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.staffHired = false;
          window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
        }
        if (hiredVaultCollectorMesh) {
          scene.remove(hiredVaultCollectorMesh);
          hiredVaultCollectorMesh = null;
        }
        vaultCollectorAI = null;
        vaultCollectorMoneyStack.forEach((b) => {
          if (b.parent) b.parent.remove(b);
        });
        vaultCollectorMoneyStack = [];

        // ====== RESET STAFF ======
        // Cashier staff
        if (window.gameConfig.staffHireTile) {
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired = false;
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.extraStaffHired = false;
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
        }
        if (hiredStaffMesh) {
          scene.remove(hiredStaffMesh);
          hiredStaffMesh = null;
        }
        if (hiredStaffMesh2) {
          scene.remove(hiredStaffMesh2);
          hiredStaffMesh2 = null;
        }

        // ====== RESET PLAYER STACK ======
        playerStack.forEach((item) => {
          item.traverse((child) => {
            if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
            if (child.material) {
              if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
              else child.material.dispose();
            }
          });
        });
        playerStack = [];
        currentStackCount = 0;

        moneyStack.forEach((item) => {
          player.remove(item);
          item.traverse((child) => {
            if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
            if (child.material) {
              if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
              else child.material.dispose();
            }
          });
        });
        moneyStack = [];
        currentMoneyCount = 0;

        // ====== RESET CASHIER ======
        cashierBurgerStack.forEach((b) => scene.remove(b));
        cashierBurgerStack = [];
        cashierCashPile.forEach((m) => scene.remove(m));
        cashierCashPile = [];
        cashierEarnings = 0;
        cashierServeTimer = 0;
        cashierServeTimer2 = 0;

        // Clear customers
        customerQueue.forEach((c) => scene.remove(c.mesh));
        customerQueue = [];

// ====== RESET DRIVE-THRU ======
        driveThruBurgerStack.forEach((b) => scene.remove(b));
        driveThruBurgerStack = [];
        driveThruCashPile.forEach((m) => scene.remove(m));
        driveThruCashPile = [];
        driveThruCarQueue.forEach((c) => scene.remove(c.mesh));
        driveThruCarQueue = [];

        // ====== RESET SELF-ORDER KIOSKS ======
        selfOrderKiosks.forEach((kiosk) => {
          kiosk.queue.forEach((c) => scene.remove(c.mesh));
          kiosk.queue = [];
          kiosk.leavers.forEach((c) => scene.remove(c.mesh));
          kiosk.leavers = [];
        });

        // ====== RESET GROUND ITEMS ======
        groundItems.forEach((item) => scene.remove(item));
        groundItems = [];
        groundMoneyItems.forEach((item) => scene.remove(item));
        groundMoneyItems = [];
        flyingItems.forEach((item) => scene.remove(item.mesh));
        flyingItems = [];

        // ====== RESET MONEY GRID ======
        initMoneyGrid();

        // ====== RESET DINING TABLE TILES ======
        if (window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles) {
          window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles.forEach((tile, index) => {
            tile.moneyDeposited = 0;
            tile.deleted = false;
          });
        }

        // ====== GENERATE NEW LEVEL LAYOUT ======
        generateNewLevelLayout();

        // ====== MOVE PLAYER TO START ======
        player.position.set(window.gameConfig.player.startX, 0, window.gameConfig.player.startZ);

        // ====== UPDATE ALL UI ======
        updateCurrencyUI();
        updateStackUI();
        updateMoneyStackUI();
        updateCashierUI();
        updateVaultUI();
        updateUpgradeUI();

        // Save immediately
        performAutosave();

        playSound('upgrade_sound');
      }

      function generateNewLevelLayout() {
        const prestige = window.gameConfig.prestige || {
          level: 0,
        };
        const prestigeLevel = prestige.level;

        // Check if we have a saved layout for this prestige level
        let currentPrestigeLayouts = window.gameConfig.prestigeLayouts || [];
        let layoutToLoad = null;

        if (currentPrestigeLayouts.length > 0) {
          // Find layout for current prestige level, or the highest available if we exceeded
          let targetLevel = prestigeLevel + 1;
          // Level 1 is prestige 0, level 2 is prestige 1, etc.

          let matchingLayout = currentPrestigeLayouts.find((l) => l.level === targetLevel);
          if (matchingLayout) {
            layoutToLoad = matchingLayout;
          } else {
            // Fallback to highest level layout available
            let maxLevel = -1;
            let maxLayout = null;
            currentPrestigeLayouts.forEach((l) => {
              if (l.level > maxLevel) {
                maxLevel = l.level;
                maxLayout = l;
              }
            });
            layoutToLoad = maxLayout;
          }
        }

        if (layoutToLoad) {
          lib.log('Loading saved layout for Prestige ' + prestigeLevel);
          applyPrestigeLayout(layoutToLoad);
        } else {
          // Fallback to randomized layout if no saved layout
          lib.log('Generating random layout for Prestige ' + prestigeLevel);

          // Randomize equipment positions in the kitchen area
          const grills = window.gameConfig.grills;
          const kitchenMinZ = -30;
          const kitchenMaxZ = -18;
          const kitchenMinX = -20;
          const kitchenMaxX = 14;

          // Randomize each grill position
          grills.forEach((grill, index) => {
            const newX = kitchenMinX + Math.random() * (kitchenMaxX - kitchenMinX);
            const newZ = kitchenMinZ + Math.random() * (kitchenMaxZ - kitchenMinZ);

            grill.x = newX;
            grill.z = newZ;

            // Update the 3D mesh position
            if (resourceNodes[index]) {
              resourceNodes[index].group.position.set(newX, 0, newZ);
              resourceNodes[index].position.x = newX;
              resourceNodes[index].position.z = newZ;
              resourceNodes[index].group.rotation.y = Math.PI;

              // Reset to ready state
              resourceNodes[index].isReady = true;
              resourceNodes[index].regenTimer = 0;
              if (resourceNodes[index].grillMesh) {
                resourceNodes[index].grillMesh.visible = true;
                resourceNodes[index].grillMesh.scale.setScalar(1);
              }
              if (resourceNodes[index].emptyMesh) {
                resourceNodes[index].emptyMesh.visible = false;
              }
            }
          });

          // Randomize cashier position (in the middle-front area)
          const cashierConfig = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
          if (cashierConfig && !cashierConfig.deleted) {
            const newCashierX = -8 + Math.random() * 16;
            const newCashierZ = 2 + Math.random() * 8;

            cashierConfig.x = newCashierX;
            cashierConfig.z = newCashierZ;

            if (cashierStallMesh) {
              updateCashierStallPosition(newCashierX, newCashierZ);
            }

            if (window.gameConfig.cashierTile) {
              window.gameConfig.cashierTile.x = newCashierX;
              window.gameConfig.cashierTile.z = newCashierZ;
              if (cashierTileMesh) {
                updateCashierTilePosition(newCashierX, newCashierZ);
              } else if (!window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked) {
                createCashierTile();
              }
            }
          }

          if (window.gameConfig.grillTile && !window.gameConfig.grillTile.deleted) {
            window.gameConfig.grillTile.x = -8 + Math.random() * 16;
            window.gameConfig.grillTile.z = -12 + Math.random() * 4;

            if (!grillTileMesh) {
              createGrillTile();
            } else {
              updateGrillTilePosition(window.gameConfig.grillTile.x, window.gameConfig.grillTile.z);
              updateGrillTileProgress();
              updateGrillTileCostDisplay();
            }
          }
          if (window.gameConfig.staffHireTile && !window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.deleted) {
            window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.x = -10 + Math.random() * 6;
            window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.z = 2 + Math.random() * 8;

            // Recreate the tile visually
            if (!staffHireTileMesh) {
              createStaffHireTile();
            } else {
              updateStaffHireTilePosition(
                window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.x,
                window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.z
              );
              updateStaffHireProgress();
              updateStaffHireCostDisplay();
            }
          }

          if (window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile && !window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.deleted) {
            window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.x = -18 + Math.random() * 8;
            window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.z = 2 + Math.random() * 6;

            if (!cleanerStaffTileMesh) {
              createCleanerStaffTile();
            } else {
              updateCleanerStaffTilePosition(
                window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.x,
                window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.z
              );
              updateCleanerStaffProgress();
              updateCleanerStaffCostDisplay();
            }
          }

          if (window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile && !window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.deleted) {
            window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.x = 10 + Math.random() * 8;
            window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.z = -8 + Math.random() * 6;

            if (!runnerStaffTileMesh) {
              createRunnerStaffTile();
            } else {
              updateRunnerStaffTilePosition(
                window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.x,
                window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.z
              );
              updateRunnerStaffProgress();
              updateRunnerStaffCostDisplay();
            }
          }

          if (window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile && !window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.deleted) {
            window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.x = 16 + Math.random() * 6;
            window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.z = -24 + Math.random() * 8;

            if (!vaultStaffTileMesh) {
              createVaultStaffTile();
            } else {
              updateVaultStaffTilePosition(
                window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.x,
                window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.z
              );
              updateVaultStaffProgress();
              updateVaultStaffCostDisplay();
            }
          }

          // Randomize dining table tile positions
          if (window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles) {
            window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles.forEach((tile, index) => {
              tile.x = -18 + (index % 4) * 10 + Math.random() * 4;
              tile.z = 18 + Math.floor(index / 4) * 8 + Math.random() * 4;
              tile.moneyDeposited = 0;
              tile.deleted = false;

              // Update visual if exists
              const tileEntry = diningTableTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === index);
              if (tileEntry) {
                updateDiningTableTilePosition(tile.x, tile.z, index);
                updateDiningTableTileProgress(index);
                updateDiningTableTileCostDisplay(index);
              } else {
                // Recreate the tile
                createDiningTableTile(index);
              }
            });
          }

          // Randomize trash bin position
          if (window.gameConfig.trashBin && !window.gameConfig.trashBin.deleted && trashBinMesh) {
            const newTrashX = 6 + Math.random() * 10;
            const newTrashZ = -14 + Math.random() * 6;
            updateTrashBinPosition(newTrashX, newTrashZ);
          }
// Reposition self-order kiosks
        if (window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks) {
          window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks.forEach((config) => {
            const kiosk = selfOrderKiosks.find(k => k.id === config.id);
            if (kiosk && kiosk.mesh && !config.deleted) {
              const newKioskX = config.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
              const newKioskZ = config.z + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
              updateSelfOrderKioskPosition(config.id, newKioskX, newKioskZ);
            }
          });
        }
      }
        // Increase difficulty slightly with prestige (e.g., higher costs)
        const costMultiplier = 1 + prestigeLevel * 0.15;
        // 15% more expensive per prestige

        if (window.gameConfig.staffHireTile) {
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.hireCost = Math.floor(100 * costMultiplier);
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile) {
          window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.hireCost = Math.floor(100 * costMultiplier);
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile) {
          window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.hireCost = Math.floor(100 * costMultiplier);
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile) {
          window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.hireCost = Math.floor(150 * costMultiplier);
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles) {
          window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles.forEach((tile) => {
            tile.tableCost = Math.floor(300 * costMultiplier);
          });
        }

        lib.log('New level layout generated for Prestige ' + prestigeLevel);
      }

      function applyPrestigeLayout(layoutData) {
        if (!layoutData) return;

        // Apply Grills
        if (layoutData.grills && Array.isArray(layoutData.grills)) {
          window.gameConfig.grills = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.grills));
          layoutData.grills.forEach((grillData, index) => {
            if (resourceNodes[index]) {
              resourceNodes[index].group.position.set(grillData.x, 0, grillData.z);
              resourceNodes[index].position.x = grillData.x;
              resourceNodes[index].position.z = grillData.z;
              resourceNodes[index].group.rotation.y = Math.PI;
              resourceNodes[index].equipmentType = grillData.equipmentType || 'grill';
              resourceNodes[index].isReady = true;
              resourceNodes[index].regenTimer = 0;

              // We'd ideally recreate the grill mesh if equipment type changed,
              // but for simplicity we'll just update position
              if (resourceNodes[index].grillMesh) {
                resourceNodes[index].grillMesh.visible = true;
                resourceNodes[index].grillMesh.scale.setScalar(1);
              }
              if (resourceNodes[index].emptyMesh) {
                resourceNodes[index].emptyMesh.visible = false;
              }
            } else {
              // Create new resource node
              createResourceNodeAt(grillData.x, grillData.z, index, grillData.equipmentType);
            }
          });

          // Remove excess resource nodes if the layout has fewer
          while (resourceNodes.length > layoutData.grills.length) {
            const node = resourceNodes.pop();
            scene.remove(node.group);
          }
        }

        // Apply Cashier
        if (layoutData.cashierStall) {
          window.gameConfig.cashierStall = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.cashierStall));
          if (cashierStallMesh)
            updateCashierStallPosition(layoutData.cashierStall.x, layoutData.cashierStall.z);
        }
        if (layoutData.cashierTile) {
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.cashierTile));
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked = false;
          if (!cashierTileMesh) createCashierTile();
          else {
            updateCashierTilePosition(layoutData.cashierTile.x, layoutData.cashierTile.z);
            updateCashierTileProgress();
            updateCashierTileCostDisplay();
          }
        }
        if (layoutData.grillTile) {
          window.gameConfig.grillTile = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.grillTile));
          window.gameConfig.grillTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.grillTile.unlocked = false;
          if (!grillTileMesh) createGrillTile();
          else {
            updateGrillTilePosition(layoutData.grillTile.x, layoutData.grillTile.z);
            updateGrillTileProgress();
            updateGrillTileCostDisplay();
          }
        }

        // Apply Staff Tiles
        if (layoutData.staffHireTile) {
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.staffHireTile));
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired = false;
          if (!staffHireTileMesh) createStaffHireTile();
          else {
            updateStaffHireTilePosition(layoutData.staffHireTile.x, layoutData.staffHireTile.z);
            updateStaffHireProgress();
            updateStaffHireCostDisplay();
          }
        }

        if (layoutData.cleanerStaffTile) {
          window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile = JSON.parse(
            JSON.stringify(layoutData.cleanerStaffTile)
          );
          window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.staffHired = false;
          if (!cleanerStaffTileMesh) createCleanerStaffTile();
          else {
            updateCleanerStaffTilePosition(
              layoutData.cleanerStaffTile.x,
              layoutData.cleanerStaffTile.z
            );
            updateCleanerStaffProgress();
            updateCleanerStaffCostDisplay();
          }
        }

        if (layoutData.runnerStaffTile) {
          window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile = JSON.parse(
            JSON.stringify(layoutData.runnerStaffTile)
          );
          window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.staffHired = false;
          if (!runnerStaffTileMesh) createRunnerStaffTile();
          else {
            updateRunnerStaffTilePosition(
              layoutData.runnerStaffTile.x,
              layoutData.runnerStaffTile.z
            );
            updateRunnerStaffProgress();
            updateRunnerStaffCostDisplay();
          }
        }

        if (layoutData.vaultStaffTile) {
          window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.vaultStaffTile));
          window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.staffHired = false;
          if (!vaultStaffTileMesh) createVaultStaffTile();
          else {
            updateVaultStaffTilePosition(layoutData.vaultStaffTile.x, layoutData.vaultStaffTile.z);
            updateVaultStaffProgress();
            updateVaultStaffCostDisplay();
          }
        }

        // Apply Dining Table Tiles
        if (layoutData.diningTableTiles) {
          window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles = JSON.parse(
            JSON.stringify(layoutData.diningTableTiles)
          );
          layoutData.diningTableTiles.forEach((tileData, index) => {
            window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[index].moneyDeposited = 0;
            window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[index].deleted = false;
            const tileEntry = diningTableTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === index);
            if (tileEntry) {
              updateDiningTableTilePosition(tileData.x, tileData.z, index);
              updateDiningTableTileProgress(index);
              updateDiningTableTileCostDisplay(index);
            } else {
              createDiningTableTile(index);
            }
          });

          // Remove excess table tiles
          for (
            let i = diningTableTileMeshes.length - 1;
            i >= layoutData.diningTableTiles.length;
            i--
          ) {
            destroyDiningTableTileVisuals(i);
          }
        }

        // Apply Trash Bin
        if (layoutData.trashBin) {
          window.gameConfig.trashBin = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.trashBin));
          if (trashBinMesh) updateTrashBinPosition(layoutData.trashBin.x, layoutData.trashBin.z);
        }

        // Apply Vault
        if (layoutData.vaultTile) {
          window.gameConfig.vaultTile = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.vaultTile));
          window.gameConfig.vaultTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.vaultTile.unlocked = false;
          if (!vaultTileMesh) createVaultTile();
          else {
            updateVaultTilePosition(layoutData.vaultTile.x, layoutData.vaultTile.z);
            updateVaultTileProgress();
            updateVaultTileCostDisplay();
          }
        }

        if (layoutData.fountainTile) {
          window.gameConfig.fountainTile = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.fountainTile));
          window.gameConfig.fountainTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.fountainTile.unlocked = false;
          if (!fountainTileMesh) createFountainTile();
          else {
            updateFountainTilePosition(layoutData.fountainTile.x, layoutData.fountainTile.z);
            updateFountainTileProgress();
            updateFountainTileCostDisplay();
          }
        }

        if (layoutData.bankVault) {
          window.gameConfig.bankVault = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.bankVault));
          if (bankVaultMesh)
            updateBankVaultPosition(layoutData.bankVault.x, layoutData.bankVault.z);
        }

        if (layoutData.fountain) {
          window.gameConfig.fountain = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.fountain));
          if (fountainMesh) updateFountainPosition(layoutData.fountain.x, layoutData.fountain.z);
        }
        if (layoutData.driveThruTile) {
          window.gameConfig.driveThruTile = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.driveThruTile));
          window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.unlocked = false;
          if (!driveThruTileMesh) createDriveThruTile();
          else {
            updateDriveThruTilePosition(layoutData.driveThruTile.x, layoutData.driveThruTile.z);
            updateDriveThruTileProgress();
            updateDriveThruTileCostDisplay();
          }
        }
        if (layoutData.trashTile) {
          window.gameConfig.trashTile = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.trashTile));
          window.gameConfig.trashTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
          window.gameConfig.trashTile.unlocked = false;
          if (!trashTileMesh) createTrashTile();
          else {
            updateTrashTilePosition(layoutData.trashTile.x, layoutData.trashTile.z);
            updateTrashTileProgress();
            updateTrashTileCostDisplay();
          }
        }
if (layoutData.selfOrderKiosks) {
          window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(layoutData.selfOrderKiosks));
          createSelfOrderKiosks();
        }
      }
      let neonSigns = [];

      function createNeonSigns() {
        neonSigns.forEach(s => scene.remove(s));
        neonSigns = [];
        const level = window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades?.signs?.level || 0;
        if (level === 0) return;

        const colors = [0x00ffff, 0xff00ff, 0xffff00];
        for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(level, 5); i++) {
          const signGroup = new THREE.Group();
          const color = colors[i % colors.length];
          const geom = new THREE.TorusGeometry(0.8, 0.05, 8, 16);
          const mat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({ color, emissive: color, emissiveIntensity: 2 });
          const ring = new THREE.Mesh(geom, mat);
          signGroup.add(ring);
          
          const star = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.OctahedronGeometry(0.3), mat);
          signGroup.add(star);

          signGroup.position.set(-19.5, 3.5, -15 + i * 10);
          signGroup.rotation.y = Math.PI/2;
          scene.add(signGroup);
          neonSigns.push(signGroup);
        }
      }

      function updateVaultUpgradeUI() {
        const upgrades = window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades || {};

          earningsEl.querySelector('.vault-cost-value').textContent = cost;
          earningsEl.querySelector('.vault-upgrade-btn').disabled = vaultBalance < cost;
        }

        // Storage Expansion
        const capacityEl = document.getElementById('vault-upgrade-capacity');
        if (capacityEl) {
          const level = upgrades.capacity || 0;
          const cost = Math.floor(750 * Math.pow(1.7, level));
          capacityEl.querySelector('.level-num').textContent = level;
          capacityEl.querySelector('.vault-cost-value').textContent = cost;
          capacityEl.querySelector('.vault-upgrade-btn').disabled = vaultBalance < cost;
        }

        // VIP Magnetism

        }

          const cost = Math.floor(600 * Math.pow(1.6, level));
          speedEl.querySelector('.level-num').textContent = level;
          speedEl.querySelector('.vault-cost-value').textContent = cost;
          speedEl.querySelector('.vault-upgrade-btn').disabled = vaultBalance < cost || level >= 10;
          // Max 50% bonus
        }

        // Master Chef

          cookEl.querySelector('.vault-cost-value').textContent = cost;

          serveEl.querySelector('.vault-upgrade-btn').disabled = vaultBalance < cost || level >= 10;

      function purchaseVaultUpgrade(type) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        if (!window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades) {
          window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades = {
            earnings: 0,
            capacity: 0,
            tips: 0,
            speed: 0,
          };
        }

        const upgrades = window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades;
        let cost = 0;

        switch (type) {
          case 'earnings':
            cost = Math.floor(700 * Math.pow(1.8, upgrades.earnings || 0));
            if (vaultBalance >= cost) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-cost);
              upgrades.earnings = (upgrades.earnings || 0) + 1;
            }
            break;
          case 'capacity':
            cost = Math.floor(750 * Math.pow(1.7, upgrades.capacity || 0));
            if (vaultBalance >= cost) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-cost);
              upgrades.capacity = (upgrades.capacity || 0) + 1;
              updateStackUI();
              // Capacity changed
            }
            break;
          case 'tips':
            const tipsLevel = upgrades.tips || 0;
            if (tipsLevel >= 10) return;
            // Max level
            cost = Math.floor(1000 * Math.pow(2, tipsLevel));
            if (vaultBalance >= cost) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-cost);
              upgrades.tips = tipsLevel + 1;
              // Update VIP spawn chance
              if (!window.gameConfig.vipCustomers) window.gameConfig.vipCustomers = {};
              window.gameConfig.vipCustomers.spawnChance = 0.15 + upgrades.tips * 0.05;
            }
            break;
          case 'speed':
            const speedLevel = upgrades.speed || 0;
            if (speedLevel >= 10) return;
            // Max level
            cost = Math.floor(600 * Math.pow(1.6, speedLevel));
            if (vaultBalance >= cost) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-cost);
              upgrades.speed = speedLevel + 1;
            }
            break;
          case 'cook':
            const cookLevel = upgrades.cook || 0;
            if (cookLevel >= 10) return;
            cost = Math.floor(800 * Math.pow(1.7, cookLevel));
            if (vaultBalance >= cost) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-cost);
              upgrades.cook = cookLevel + 1;
              // Update regen time dynamically if needed
            }
            break;
          case 'serve':
            const serveLevel = upgrades.serve || 0;
            if (serveLevel >= 10) return;
            cost = Math.floor(650 * Math.pow(1.6, serveLevel));
            if (vaultBalance >= cost) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-cost);
              upgrades.serve = serveLevel + 1;
              // Update serve time dynamically if needed
            }
            break;
          case 'cashpile':
            const cashpileLevel = upgrades.cashpile || 0;
            if (cashpileLevel >= 10) return;
            cost = Math.floor(900 * Math.pow(1.6, cashpileLevel));
            if (vaultBalance >= cost) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-cost);
              upgrades.cashpile = cashpileLevel + 1;
            }
            break;
          case 'decor_tables':
          case 'decor_signs':
          case 'decor_plants':
            const dType = type.split('_')[1];
            if (!window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades) window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades = { tables: { level: 0 }, signs: { level: 0 }, plants: { level: 0 } };
            const dLevel = window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades[dType].level || 0;
            if (dLevel >= 5) return;
            cost = Math.floor(800 * Math.pow(2.2, dLevel));
            if (vaultBalance >= cost) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-cost);
              window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades[dType].level = dLevel + 1;
              if (dType === 'signs') createNeonSigns();
              if (dType === 'tables') {
                diningTableMeshes.forEach(t => {
                   t.mesh.children.forEach(c => {
                      if (c.material && c.material.color) c.material.color.lerp(new THREE.Color(0xFFD700), 0.1);
                   });
                });
              }
            }
            break;
        }

        if (cost > 0) {
          window.gameConfig.bankVault.balance = vaultBalance;
          playSound('upgrade_sound');
          updateVaultUI();
        }
      }

            break;
          case 'cleaner':
            iconEl.textContent = '🧹';
            titleEl.textContent = t('notifications.staffHiredTitle');
            subtitleEl.textContent = t('notifications.cleaner');
            break;
          case 'runner':
            iconEl.textContent = '🏃';
            titleEl.textContent = t('notifications.staffHiredTitle');
            subtitleEl.textContent = t('notifications.runner');

      function setupUpgradeButtons() {
        // Setup vault panel (main upgrade UI)
        setupVaultPanel();
      }

      function setupVaultPanel() {
        const vaultToggle = document.getElementById('vault-toggle');
        const vaultPanel = document.getElementById('vault-panel');
        const vaultClose = vaultPanel.querySelector('.vault-close');

        const lbToggle = cachedDOMElements.leaderboardToggle;
        const lbPanel = cachedDOMElements.leaderboardPanel;
        const lbClose = cachedDOMElements.leaderboardClose;

        if (lbToggle && lbPanel) {
            lbToggle.addEventListener('click', async () => {
                lbPanel.classList.add('open');
                try {
                    const response = await lib.getTopNEntriesFromLeaderboard(10);
                    renderLeaderboard(response.entries || [], response.userRank);
                } catch (error) {
                    lib.log(`Failed to fetch leaderboard: ${error.message}`);
                }
            });
            lbClose.addEventListener('click', () => lbPanel.classList.remove('open'));
        }

        if (vaultToggle) {
          vaultToggle.style.display = 'flex';
        }

        if (vaultToggle && vaultPanel) {
          vaultToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
            vaultPanel.classList.add('open');
            updateVaultUI();
            updateStatsUI();
          });

          vaultClose.addEventListener('click', () => {
            vaultPanel.classList.remove('open');
          });

          // Close when clicking outside
          vaultPanel.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target === vaultPanel) {
              vaultPanel.classList.remove('open');
            }
          });

          // Setup tabs
          const tabs = vaultPanel.querySelectorAll('.vault-tab');
          const contents = vaultPanel.querySelectorAll('.vault-tab-content');

          tabs.forEach((tab) => {
            tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
              // Remove active class from all tabs and contents
              tabs.forEach((t) => t.classList.remove('active'));
              contents.forEach((c) => c.classList.remove('active'));

              // Add active class to clicked tab and corresponding content
              tab.classList.add('active');
              const targetId = 'vault-tab-' + tab.dataset.tab;
              const targetContent = document.getElementById(targetId);
              if (targetContent) {
                targetContent.classList.add('active');
              }

              if (tab.dataset.tab === 'stats') {
                updateStatsUI();
              }
            });
          });

          // Setup vault upgrade buttons
          const earningsBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-upgrade-earnings .vault-upgrade-btn');
          const capacityBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-upgrade-capacity .vault-upgrade-btn');
          const tipsBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-upgrade-tips .vault-upgrade-btn');
          const speedBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-upgrade-speed .vault-upgrade-btn');
          const cookBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-upgrade-cook .vault-upgrade-btn');
          const serveBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-upgrade-serve .vault-upgrade-btn');
          const cashpileBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-upgrade-cashpile .vault-upgrade-btn');

          if (earningsBtn)
            earningsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('earnings'));
          if (capacityBtn)
            capacityBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('capacity'));
          if (tipsBtn) tipsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('tips'));
          if (speedBtn) speedBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('speed'));
          if (cookBtn) cookBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('cook'));
          if (serveBtn) serveBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('serve'));
          if (cashpileBtn)
            cashpileBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('cashpile'));

          const decorTablesBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-decor-tables .vault-upgrade-btn');
          const decorSignsBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-decor-signs .vault-upgrade-btn');
          const decorPlantsBtn = document.querySelector('#vault-decor-plants .vault-upgrade-btn');
          if (decorTablesBtn) decorTablesBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('decor_tables'));
          if (decorSignsBtn) decorSignsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('decor_signs'));
          if (decorPlantsBtn) decorPlantsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => purchaseVaultUpgrade('decor_plants'));

          // Setup prestige button
          const prestigeBtn = document.getElementById('prestige-btn');
          if (prestigeBtn) {
            prestigeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => performPrestige());
          }
        }
      }

      function updateStatsUI() {
        const vaultBalanceEl = document.getElementById('stat-vault-balance');
        const prestigeLevelEl = document.getElementById('stat-prestige-level');
        const profitMultEl = document.getElementById('stat-profit-mult');
        const vipChanceEl = document.getElementById('stat-vip-chance');
        const moveSpeedEl = document.getElementById('stat-move-speed');
        const trayCapacityEl = document.getElementById('stat-tray-capacity');

        if (vaultBalanceEl) vaultBalanceEl.textContent = '$' + formatCurrencyAbbrev(vaultBalance);
        updateTotalMoneyUI();
        if (prestigeLevelEl) {
          const prestige = window.gameConfig.prestige || {
            level: 0,
          };
          prestigeLevelEl.textContent = prestige.level;
        }
        if (profitMultEl) {
          const prestigeMult = getPrestigeProfitMultiplier();
          const rushMult = getRushHourTipMultiplier();
          const totalMult = prestigeMult * rushMult;
          profitMultEl.textContent = 'x' + totalMult.toFixed(2);
        }
        if (vipChanceEl) {
          const upgrades = window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades || {};
          const baseChance = 15;
          const upgradeBonus = (upgrades.tips || 0) * 5;
          vipChanceEl.textContent = baseChance + upgradeBonus + '%';
        }
        if (moveSpeedEl) {
          moveSpeedEl.textContent = Math.round(getMoveSpeed());
        }
        if (trayCapacityEl) {
          trayCapacityEl.textContent = getMaxCapacity();
        }

      function purchaseUpgrade(type) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.upgrades[type];
        const cost = Math.floor(config.baseCost * Math.pow(config.costMultiplier, config.level));

        if (currentCurrency >= cost) {
          modifyVaultBalance(-cost);
          window.gameConfig.upgrades[type].level++;

          playSound('upgrade_sound');
          updateStackUI();
        }
      }

      function showCollectionProgress(progress) {
        const progressEl = cachedDOMElements.collectionProgress;
        const progressBar = cachedDOMElements.progressBar;
        if (!progressEl || !progressBar) return;

        if (progress > 0 && progress < 1) {
          progressEl.classList.remove('hidden');
          progressBar.style.width = progress * 100 + '%';
        } else {
          progressEl.classList.add('hidden');
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // GAME LOGIC
      // ============================================

      function getMaxCapacity() {
        const config = window.gameConfig;
        let baseCapacity =
          config.player.baseCapacity +
          config.upgrades.capacity.level * config.upgrades.capacity.bonusPerLevel;

        // Add vault capacity bonus
        const vaultUpgrades = config.vaultUpgrades || {};
        const vaultCapacityBonus = (vaultUpgrades.capacity || 0) * 10;

        return baseCapacity + vaultCapacityBonus;
      }

      function getMoveSpeed() {
        const config = window.gameConfig;
        let baseSpeed =
          config.player.baseSpeed +
          config.upgrades.speed.level * config.upgrades.speed.bonusPerLevel;

        // Add vault speed bonus (5% per level)
        const vaultUpgrades = config.vaultUpgrades || {};
        const vaultSpeedMultiplier = 1 + (vaultUpgrades.speed || 0) * 0.05;

        let finalSpeed = baseSpeed * vaultSpeedMultiplier;
        if (currentStackCount >= getMaxCapacity()) {
          finalSpeed *= 0.5; // 50% slower when carrying max stack of burgers
        }
        return finalSpeed;
      }

      function getCollectionTime() {
        const config = window.gameConfig;
        const reduction =
          config.upgrades.collection.level * config.upgrades.collection.reductionPerLevel;

        // Add vault cook time reduction (5% per level)
        const vaultUpgrades = config.vaultUpgrades || {};
        const vaultCookBonus = 1 - (vaultUpgrades.cook || 0) * 0.05;

        return Math.max(0.1, (config.player.baseCollectionTime - reduction) * vaultCookBonus);
      }

      function getVacuumSpeed() {
        return window.gameConfig.settings.vacuumSpeed || VACUUM_SPEED_DEFAULT;
      }

      // Optimized distance calculation (avoiding sqrt when possible)
      function distanceSquared(x1, z1, x2, z2) {
        const dx = x1 - x2;
        const dz = z1 - z2;
        return dx * dx + dz * dz;
      }

      function distance(x1, z1, x2, z2) {
        return Math.sqrt(distanceSquared(x1, z1, x2, z2));
      }

      // Squish animation state
      let playerSquishState = {
        scaleY: 1,
        scaleXZ: 1,
        targetScaleY: 1,
        targetScaleXZ: 1,
        wasMoving: false,
      };

      let tutorialHintTimer = 0;
      let hintVisible = false;

      function getUnlockOrder() {
        return (
          window.gameConfig.unlockOrder || [
            'diningTable',
            'grillTile',
            'cashierTile',
            'trashTile',
            'staffHireTile',
            'driveThruTile',
            'vaultTile',
            'cleanerStaffTile',
            'runnerStaffTile',
            'vaultStaffTile',
            'fountainTile',
          ]
        );
      }

      function isTileUnlockedByKey(key) {
        switch (key) {
          case 'diningTable':
            return window.gameConfig.diningTables && window.gameConfig.diningTables.length > 0;
          case 'grillTile':
            return window.gameConfig.grillTile && window.gameConfig.grillTile.unlocked;
          case 'cashierTile':
            return window.gameConfig.cashierTile && window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked;
          case 'trashTile':
            return window.gameConfig.trashTile && window.gameConfig.trashTile.unlocked;
          case 'staffHireTile':
            return window.gameConfig.staffHireTile && window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired;
          case 'driveThruTile':
            return window.gameConfig.driveThruTile && window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.unlocked;
          case 'vaultTile':
            return window.gameConfig.vaultTile && window.gameConfig.vaultTile.unlocked;
          case 'cleanerStaffTile':
            return (
