              window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile && window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.staffHired
            );
          case 'runnerStaffTile':
            return (
              window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile && window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.staffHired
            );
          case 'vaultStaffTile':
            return window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile && window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.staffHired;
          case 'fountainTile':
            return window.gameConfig.fountainTile && window.gameConfig.fountainTile.unlocked;
          case 'selfOrderKioskTile':
            return (
              window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile && window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile.unlocked
            );
          default:
            return false;
        }
      }

      function getUnlockStepFromOrder() {
        const order = getUnlockOrder();
        let step = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < order.length; i++) {
          if (isTileUnlockedByKey(order[i])) {
            step = i + 1;
          } else {
            break;
          }
        }
        return step;
      }

      function shouldShowUnlockTile(key) {
        const order = getUnlockOrder();
        const index = order.indexOf(key);
        if (index === -1) return false;
        const step = window.gameConfig.tutorialStep || 0;
        return index <= step;
      }

      function checkTutorialProgression() {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const step = getUnlockStepFromOrder();
        window.gameConfig.tutorialStep = step;

        if (
          shouldShowUnlockTile('grillTile') &&
          !grillTileMesh &&
          window.gameConfig.grillTile &&
          !window.gameConfig.grillTile.unlocked &&
          !window.gameConfig.grillTile.deleted
        ) {
          createGrillTile();
          playSound('upgrade_sound');
        }

        if (
          shouldShowUnlockTile('cashierTile') &&
          !cashierTileMesh &&
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile &&
          !window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked &&
          !window.gameConfig.cashierTile.deleted
        ) {
          createCashierTile();
          playSound('upgrade_sound');
        }

        if (shouldShowUnlockTile('trashTile')) {
          if (
            !trashTileMesh &&
            window.gameConfig.trashTile &&
            !window.gameConfig.trashTile.unlocked &&
            !window.gameConfig.trashTile.deleted
          ) {
            createTrashTile();
          }
          if (
            !staffHireTileMesh &&
            window.gameConfig.staffHireTile &&
            !window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired &&
            !window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.deleted
          ) {
            createStaffHireTile();
          }
          if (window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles) {
            let tableTileCreated = false;
            window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles.forEach((tile, index) => {
              if (index > 0 && !tile.deleted && !tableTileCreated) {
                if (!diningTableTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === index)) {
                  createDiningTableTile(index);
                }
                tableTileCreated = true;
              }
            });
          }
        }

        if (shouldShowUnlockTile('driveThruTile')) {
          if (
            !driveThruTileMesh &&
            window.gameConfig.driveThruTile &&
            !window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.unlocked &&
            !window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.deleted
          ) {
            createDriveThruTile();
            playSound('upgrade_sound');
          }
          if (
            !vaultTileMesh &&
            window.gameConfig.vaultTile &&
            !window.gameConfig.vaultTile.unlocked &&
            !window.gameConfig.vaultTile.deleted
          ) {
            createVaultTile();
            playSound('upgrade_sound');
          }
          if (
            !cleanerStaffTileMesh &&
            window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile &&
            !window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.staffHired &&
            !window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.deleted
          ) {
            createCleanerStaffTile();
          }
          if (
            !runnerStaffTileMesh &&
            window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile &&
            !window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.staffHired &&
            !window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.deleted
          ) {
            createRunnerStaffTile();
          }
          if (
            !vaultStaffTileMesh &&
            window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile &&
            !window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.staffHired &&
            !window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.deleted
          ) {
            createVaultStaffTile();
          }
          if (
            window.gameConfig.fountainTile &&
            shouldShowUnlockTile('fountainTile') &&
            !window.gameConfig.fountainTile.unlocked &&
            !window.gameConfig.fountainTile.deleted &&
            !fountainTileMesh
          ) {
            createFountainTile();
          }
          if (
            window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile &&
            shouldShowUnlockTile('selfOrderKioskTile') &&
            !window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile.unlocked &&
            !window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile.deleted &&
            !selfOrderKioskTileMesh
          ) {
            createSelfOrderKioskTile();
          }
        }
      }

      function getCashierHeldUpReason() {
        if (window.gameConfig.cashierStall && !window.gameConfig.cashierStall.deleted) {
          let firstWaiting = null;
          for (let i = 0; i < customerQueue.length; i++) {
            if (customerQueue[i].state === 'waiting' && customerQueue[i].queuePosition === 0) {
              firstWaiting = customerQueue[i];
              break;
            }
          }
          if (firstWaiting && firstWaiting.waitTime > 5) {
            const config = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
            const maxMoney =
              (config.maxMoney || 50) + (window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades?.cashpile || 0) * 20;
            const staffHired =
              window.gameConfig.staffHireTile && window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired;

            if (cashierCashPile.length >= maxMoney) {
              return 'cash';
            } else if (cashierBurgerStack.length === 0) {
              return 'food';
            } else if (!staffHired && !isInCashierZone) {
              return 'man';
            }
          }
        }
        return null;
      }

      function updateTutorialArrow(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') {
          if (tutorialArrowMesh) tutorialArrowMesh.visible = false;
          if (tutorialRopeMesh) tutorialRopeMesh.visible = false;
          return;
        }
        if (!tutorialArrowMesh) return;

        let targetPos = null;
        let targetYOffset = 3;

        const cashierHeldUpReason = getCashierHeldUpReason();

        const table0 = window.gameConfig.diningTables && window.gameConfig.diningTables.length > 0;
        const grillUnlocked = window.gameConfig.grillTile && window.gameConfig.grillTile.unlocked;
        const cashierUnlocked =
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile && window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked;
        const cashierStocked =
          cashierBurgerStack.length > 0 || window.gameConfig.tutorialHasStockedCashier;
        const staffHired =
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile && window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired;
        const hasCleanedTable = window.gameConfig.tutorialHasCleanedTable || false;

        if (cashierHeldUpReason === 'cash') {
          // No arrow needed - cash is automatically collected
        } else if (cashierHeldUpReason === 'food') {
          if (currentStackCount > 0) {
            if (cashierStallMesh) {
              targetPos = { x: cashierStallMesh.position.x, z: cashierStallMesh.position.z };
              targetYOffset = 4;
            }
          } else {
            let readyGrill = null;
            for (const node of resourceNodes) {
              if (node.isReady) {
                readyGrill = node;
                break;
              }
            }
            if (readyGrill) {
              targetPos = { x: readyGrill.position.x, z: readyGrill.position.z };
            } else if (resourceNodes.length > 0 && resourceNodes[0].grillMesh) {
              targetPos = { x: resourceNodes[0].position.x, z: resourceNodes[0].position.z };
            }
          }
        } else if (cashierHeldUpReason === 'man') {
          if (cashierStallMesh) {
            targetPos = { x: cashierStallMesh.position.x, z: cashierStallMesh.position.z - 2 };
          }
        } else if (!table0) {
          if (window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles.length > 0) {
            targetPos = {
              x: window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[0].x,
              z: window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[0].z,
            };
          }
        } else if (!grillUnlocked) {
          if (window.gameConfig.grillTile) {
            targetPos = { x: window.gameConfig.grillTile.x, z: window.gameConfig.grillTile.z };
          }
        } else if (!cashierUnlocked) {
          if (window.gameConfig.cashierTile) {
            targetPos = { x: window.gameConfig.cashierTile.x, z: window.gameConfig.cashierTile.z };
          }
        } else if (!cashierStocked) {
          if (currentStackCount > 0) {
            if (cashierStallMesh) {
              targetPos = { x: cashierStallMesh.position.x, z: cashierStallMesh.position.z };
              targetYOffset = 4;
            }
          } else {
            if (resourceNodes.length > 0 && resourceNodes[0].grillMesh) {
              targetPos = { x: resourceNodes[0].position.x, z: resourceNodes[0].position.z };
            }
          }
        } else if (!staffHired) {
          if (staffHireTileMesh) {
            targetPos = { x: staffHireTileMesh.position.x, z: staffHireTileMesh.position.z };
          }
        } else if (!hasCleanedTable) {
          let dirtyTable = null;
          for (const table of diningTableMeshes) {
            if (table.tableData.hasTrash) {
              dirtyTable = table;
              break;
            }
          }
          if (dirtyTable) {
            targetPos = { x: dirtyTable.tableData.x, z: dirtyTable.tableData.z };
            targetYOffset = 3;
          }
        } else if (window.gameConfig.driveThruTile && window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.unlocked && !window.gameConfig.tutorialHasSeenDriveThruHint) {
          if (currentStackCount > 0) {
            if (driveThruBoothMesh) {
              const depositZoneX = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 3;
              targetPos = { x: depositZoneX, z: driveThruBoothMesh.position.z };
              targetYOffset = 3;
            }
          } else {
            let readyGrill = null;
            for (const node of resourceNodes) {
              if (node.isReady) {
                readyGrill = node;
                break;
              }
            }
            if (readyGrill) {
              targetPos = { x: readyGrill.position.x, z: readyGrill.position.z };
            } else if (resourceNodes.length > 0 && resourceNodes[0].grillMesh) {
              targetPos = { x: resourceNodes[0].position.x, z: resourceNodes[0].position.z };
            }
          }
        }

        if (targetPos) {
          tutorialArrowMesh.visible = true;
          tutorialArrowMesh.position.set(targetPos.x, targetYOffset + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.005) * 0.5, targetPos.z);
          tutorialArrowMesh.rotation.y += deltaTime * 2;
          
          if (tutorialRopeMesh) {
            tutorialRopeMesh.visible = true;
            const start = player.position;
            const dx = targetPos.x - start.x;
            const dz = targetPos.z - start.z;
            const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);
            
            // Position midpoint, raised slightly to be above floor items
            tutorialRopeMesh.position.set(start.x + dx/2, 0.5, start.z + dz/2);
            // Rotate to look at target
            tutorialRopeMesh.lookAt(targetPos.x, 0.5, targetPos.z);
            // Scale length (mesh is 1 unit long by default)
            tutorialRopeMesh.scale.set(1, 1, dist);
            // Pulse opacity more aggressively
            tutorialRopeMesh.material.opacity = 0.5 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.012) * 0.3;
          }
        } else {
          tutorialArrowMesh.visible = false;
          if (tutorialRopeMesh) tutorialRopeMesh.visible = false;
        }
      }

      function showTutorialComplete() {
        if (tutorialCompleteShown) return;
        tutorialCompleteShown = true;
        tutorialCompleteTimer = 2.5;
        window.gameConfig.tutorialCompleted = true;

        const vaultToggle = document.getElementById('vault-toggle');
        if (vaultToggle) vaultToggle.style.display = 'flex';

        const overlay = document.getElementById('tutorial-complete');
        if (overlay) {
          overlay.classList.add('show');
        }

        if (window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles) {
          window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles.forEach((tile) => {
            if (tile) tile.hidden = false;
          });
          createSelfOrderKioskTiles();
        }

        spawnConfettiBurst(80);
        playSound('upgrade_sound');
      }

      function spawnConfettiBurst(count = 60) {
        const layer = document.getElementById('confetti-layer');
        if (!layer) return;
        const colors = ['#F1C40F', '#E74C3C', '#2ECC71', '#3498DB', '#9B59B6', '#F39C12'];
        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
          const piece = document.createElement('div');
          piece.className = 'confetti-piece';
          piece.style.left = Math.random() * 100 + '%';
          piece.style.background = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
          piece.style.transform = `translateY(-10vh) rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`;
          piece.style.animationDelay = Math.random() * 0.3 + 's';
          piece.style.width = 8 + Math.random() * 8 + 'px';
          piece.style.height = 12 + Math.random() * 10 + 'px';
          layer.appendChild(piece);
          piece.addEventListener('animationend', () => piece.remove());
        }
      }

      function updateTutorialHint(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const cashierHeldUpReason = getCashierHeldUpReason();

        const table0 = window.gameConfig.diningTables && window.gameConfig.diningTables.length > 0;
        const grillUnlocked = window.gameConfig.grillTile && window.gameConfig.grillTile.unlocked;
        const cashierUnlocked =
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile && window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked;
        const cashierStocked =
          cashierBurgerStack.length > 0 || window.gameConfig.tutorialHasStockedCashier;
        const staffHired =
          window.gameConfig.staffHireTile && window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired;
        const hasCleanedTable = window.gameConfig.tutorialHasCleanedTable || false;

        let hintText = '';

        if (cashierHeldUpReason === 'cash') {
          hintText = t('tutorial.cashFull');
        } else if (cashierHeldUpReason === 'food') {
          if (currentStackCount === 0) hintText = t('tutorial.waitingCollect');
          else hintText = t('tutorial.waitingBring');
        } else if (cashierHeldUpReason === 'man') {
          hintText = t('tutorial.waitingMan');
        } else if (!table0) {
          hintText = t('tutorial.buildTable');
        } else if (!grillUnlocked) {
          hintText = t('tutorial.buildGrill');
        } else if (!cashierUnlocked) {
          hintText = t('tutorial.buildCashier');
        } else if (!cashierStocked) {
          if (currentStackCount === 0) hintText = t('tutorial.collectFood');
          else hintText = t('tutorial.bringFood');
        } else if (!hasCleanedTable) {
          hintText = t('tutorial.cleanTable');
        } else if (window.gameConfig.driveThruTile && window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.unlocked && !window.gameConfig.tutorialHasSeenDriveThruHint) {
          if (currentStackCount === 0) {
            hintText = t('tutorial.driveThruCollect');
          } else {
            hintText = t('tutorial.driveThruDeposit');
          }
        } else {
          showTutorialComplete();
        }

        const hintEl = document.getElementById('tutorial-hint');
        if (hintEl) {
          if (hintText) {
            hintEl.textContent = hintText;
            hintEl.style.opacity = 1;
          } else {
            hintEl.style.opacity = 0;
          }
        }
      }

      function updatePlayer(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        updateInputFromKeyboard();

        const speed = getMoveSpeed();

        const s = Math.sin(targetCameraAngle);
        const c = Math.cos(targetCameraAngle);
        const rotatedX = inputVector.x * c + inputVector.z * s;
        const rotatedZ = -inputVector.x * s + inputVector.z * c;

        const moveX = rotatedX * speed * deltaTime;
        const moveZ = rotatedZ * speed * deltaTime;
        const isMoving = moveX !== 0 || moveZ !== 0;

        if (isMoving) {
          // Update position
          player.position.x += moveX;
          player.position.z += moveZ;

          // Clamp to rectangular restaurant bounds (expanded for outdoor areas)
          const leftBound = -RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 + 1;
          const rightBound = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 + 15; // Expanded for drive-thru
          const halfDepth = RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2 - 1;
          player.position.x = Math.max(leftBound, Math.min(rightBound, player.position.x));
          player.position.z = Math.max(-halfDepth, Math.min(halfDepth, player.position.z));

          // Rotate player to face movement direction
          const targetAngle = Math.atan2(moveX, moveZ);
          player.rotation.y = targetAngle;

          // Squishy walk cycle - squash and stretch with movement
          const walkCycle = Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.015) * 0.5 + 0.5;
          // 0 to 1
          playerSquishState.targetScaleY = 0.92 + walkCycle * 0.16;
          // 0.92 to 1.08
          playerSquishState.targetScaleXZ = 1.08 - walkCycle * 0.16;
          // 1.08 to 0.92

          // Trigger squish when starting to move
          if (!playerSquishState.wasMoving) {
            playerSquishState.scaleY = 0.85;
            playerSquishState.scaleXZ = 1.15;
          }
        } else {
          // Idle breathing/bounce animation
          const breathe = Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003);
          playerSquishState.targetScaleY = 1 + breathe * 0.03;
          playerSquishState.targetScaleXZ = 1 - breathe * 0.02;

          // Trigger squish when stopping
          if (playerSquishState.wasMoving) {
            playerSquishState.scaleY = 1.12;
            playerSquishState.scaleXZ = 0.88;
          }
        }

        playerSquishState.wasMoving = isMoving;

        // Switch player animation based on state
        const isCarrying = currentStackCount > 0 || currentMoneyCount > 0;
        if (isMoving) {
          switchAnimation(player, isCarrying ? 'walkCarry' : 'run');
        } else if (
          isCollecting ||
          isInCashierZone ||
          isInSellZone ||
          isInMoneyZone ||
          isInSpendZone
        ) {
          switchAnimation(player, 'interact');
        } else {
          switchAnimation(player, 'idle');
        }

        // Smooth squish interpolation (springy feel)
        const squishSpeed = 12 * deltaTime;
        playerSquishState.scaleY +=
          (playerSquishState.targetScaleY - playerSquishState.scaleY) * squishSpeed;
        playerSquishState.scaleXZ +=
          (playerSquishState.targetScaleXZ - playerSquishState.scaleXZ) * squishSpeed;

        // Apply squish to player
        player.scale.set(
          playerSquishState.scaleXZ,
          playerSquishState.scaleY,
          playerSquishState.scaleXZ
        );

        // Spawn dust particles when walking
        if (isMoving && Math.random() < 0.3) {
          // 30% chance each frame
          spawnDustParticle(player.position.x, 0, player.position.z, moveX, moveZ);
        }

        // Bobbing animation for stack (burgers and money)
        const bobAmount = Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.005) * 0.02;
        playerStack.forEach((item, i) => {
          item.position.y = PLAYER_HEIGHT + i * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT + bobAmount * (i + 1) * 0.5;
          item.position.z = 1;
        });

        updateTray(player, playerStack);

        // Update money stack positions (on top of burgers)
        const burgerStackHeight = playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT;
        moneyStack.forEach((money, i) => {
          money.position.y =
            PLAYER_HEIGHT +
            burgerStackHeight +
            i * MONEY_STACK_HEIGHT +
            bobAmount * (playerStack.length + i + 1) * 0.5;
        });

        if (player.userData.maxSprite) {
          const isBurgerMax = currentStackCount >= getMaxCapacity();
          const isMoneyMax = currentMoneyCount >= MAX_MONEY_CAPACITY;
          if (isBurgerMax || isMoneyMax) {
            player.userData.maxSprite.visible = true;
            const totalStackCount = playerStack.length + moneyStack.length;
            const stackY =
              PLAYER_HEIGHT + burgerStackHeight + moneyStack.length * MONEY_STACK_HEIGHT;
            player.userData.maxSprite.position.y =
              stackY + 0.6 + bobAmount * (totalStackCount + 2) * 0.5;
          } else {
            player.userData.maxSprite.visible = false;
          }
        }
      }

      function updateCamera() {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') {
          // In edit mode, use camera offset from panning - higher and wider view
          const targetX = editorCameraOffset.x;
          const targetZ = editorCameraOffset.z + 35;
          const targetY = 50;
          // Higher view for editing full restaurant

          camera.position.x += (targetX - camera.position.x) * 0.1;
          camera.position.z += (targetZ - camera.position.z) * 0.1;
          camera.position.y += (targetY - camera.position.y) * 0.1;

          camera.lookAt(editorCameraOffset.x, 0, editorCameraOffset.z);
        } else {
          // Follow player directly with smooth interpolation
          currentCameraAngle += (targetCameraAngle - currentCameraAngle) * 0.1;

          const distance = isZoomedOut ? 30 : 18;
          const targetX = player.position.x + Math.sin(currentCameraAngle) * distance;
          const targetZ = player.position.z + Math.cos(currentCameraAngle) * distance;
          // Camera behind player
          const targetY = isZoomedOut ? 40 : 22;
          // Camera height

          // Smooth camera follow (higher value = more responsive)
          const followSpeed = 0.08;
          camera.position.x += (targetX - camera.position.x) * followSpeed;
          camera.position.z += (targetZ - camera.position.z) * followSpeed;
          camera.position.y += (targetY - camera.position.y) * followSpeed;

          // Look at player position
          camera.lookAt(player.position.x, player.position.y + 2, player.position.z);
        }
      }

      function updateResourceNodes(deltaTime) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.resources;
        const playerX = player.position.x;
        const playerZ = player.position.z;
        const rangeSquared = COLLECTION_RANGE * COLLECTION_RANGE;

        nearestNode = null;
        let nearestDistSq = Infinity;
        const now = Date.now();

        for (let i = 0; i < resourceNodes.length; i++) {
          const node = resourceNodes[i];

          // Animate steam on ready grills (throttled)
          if (node.isReady && node.grillMesh) {
            const children = node.grillMesh.children;
            for (let j = 0; j < children.length; j++) {
              const child = children[j];
              if (child.userData.steamOffset !== undefined) {
                child.position.y = 1.5 + Math.sin(now * 0.003 + child.userData.steamOffset) * 0.2;
                child.material.opacity =
                  0.3 + Math.sin(now * 0.002 + child.userData.steamOffset) * 0.2;
              }
            }
          }

          // Check regeneration
          if (!node.isReady) {
            node.regenTimer -= deltaTime;

            // Visual regeneration progress (food cooking)
            const progress = 1 - node.regenTimer / config.regenerationTime;
            if (node.grillMesh) {
              node.grillMesh.scale.setScalar(Math.min(progress, 1));
            }

            if (node.regenTimer <= 0) {
              node.isReady = true;
              if (node.grillMesh) {
                node.grillMesh.visible = true;
                node.grillMesh.scale.setScalar(1);
              }
              if (node.emptyMesh) {
                node.emptyMesh.visible = false;
              }
            }
          }

          // Find nearest ready node (use squared distance to avoid sqrt)
          if (node.isReady && gameMode === 'play') {
            const distSq = distanceSquared(playerX, playerZ, node.position.x, node.position.z);

            if (distSq < rangeSquared && distSq < nearestDistSq) {
              nearestDistSq = distSq;
              nearestNode = node;
            }
          }
        }
      }

      function updateCollection(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const maxCapacity = getMaxCapacity();

        if (nearestNode && currentStackCount < maxCapacity) {
          isCollecting = true;
          collectionProgress += deltaTime / getCollectionTime();

          if (collectionProgress >= 1) {
            collectionProgress = 0;

            // Deplete equipment and collect food directly
            if (nearestNode.isReady) {
              nearestNode.isReady = false;
              nearestNode.regenTimer = window.gameConfig.resources.regenerationTime;
              if (nearestNode.grillMesh) {
                nearestNode.grillMesh.visible = false;
                nearestNode.grillMesh.scale.setScalar(0);
              }
              if (nearestNode.emptyMesh) {
                nearestNode.emptyMesh.visible = true;
              }

              // Get the equipment type and collect appropriate food
              const equipmentType = nearestNode.equipmentType || 'grill';
              const itemsToCollect = 3 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2);
              
              for (let i = 0; i < itemsToCollect; i++) {
                if (currentStackCount < maxCapacity) {
                  const menuItem = getRandomMenuItemForEquipment(equipmentType);
                  addToStack(menuItem);
                }
              }

              playSound('pickup_sound');
            }
          }

          showCollectionProgress(collectionProgress);
        } else {
          isCollecting = false;
          collectionProgress = 0;
          showCollectionProgress(0);
        }
      }

      function updateSelling(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.sellZone;
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;
        const sellRadius = config.radius;
        const sellX = config.x || 0;
        const sellZ = config.z || 0;
        const dx = player.position.x - sellX;
        const dz = player.position.z - sellZ;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);

        isInSellZone = dist < sellRadius;

        if (isInSellZone && currentStackCount > 0) {
          sellTimer += deltaTime;

          if (sellTimer >= SELL_DELAY) {
            sellTimer = 0;

            if (playerStack.length > 0) {
              // Remove from stack visually
              const item = playerStack.pop();
              player.remove(item);
              currentStackCount = playerStack.length;
              updateStackUI();

              // Throw item toward sell zone with arc
              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                z: player.position.z,
              };

              const targetPos = {
                x: sellX,
                y: 1,
                z: sellZ,
              };

              // Create flying burger that spawns money when it arrives
              const flyingBurger = createFlyingItem(
                startPos,
                targetPos,
                'burger',
                () => {
                  // Spawn money in the money zone when burger arrives
                  const moneyConfig = window.gameConfig.moneyZone;
                  const gridIndex = findBestGridSlot();
                  const gridPos = getGridPosition(gridIndex);
                  const stackHeight = moneyGridStacks[gridIndex].count * 0.25;

                  // Throw money from sell zone to money zone
              const moneyStartPos = {
                    x: sellX,
                    y: 1.5,
                    z: sellZ,
                  };
                  const moneyTargetPos = {
                    x: player.position.x,
                    y: player.position.y + 2,
                    z: player.position.z,
                  };

                  createFlyingItem(
                    moneyStartPos,
                    moneyTargetPos,
                    'money',
                    () => {
                      // Add directly to vault balance when money arrives
                      const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
                      modifyVaultBalance(moneyValue);
                      playSound('sell_sound');
                    },
                    true
                  );

                  playSound('sell_sound');
                },
                true
              );

              // Dispose of original item
              item.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                    child.material.forEach((mat) => mat.dispose());
                  } else {
                    child.material.dispose();
                  }
                }
              });
            }
          }
        } else {
          sellTimer = 0;
        }

        // Animate sell zone
        if (sellZoneGlow) {
          const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.05;
          sellZoneGlow.scale.setScalar(pulseScale);
        }

        // Animate coin indicator
        if (sellZoneMesh) {
          const coinIndicator = sellZoneMesh.userData.coinIndicator;
          if (coinIndicator) {
            coinIndicator.rotation.y += deltaTime * 2;
            coinIndicator.position.y =
              coinIndicator.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.002) * 0.3;
          }
        }
      }

      function updateGroundItems(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const maxCapacity = getMaxCapacity();
        const vacuumRangeSq = VACUUM_RANGE * VACUUM_RANGE;
        const playerX = player.position.x;
        const playerY = player.position.y;
        const playerZ = player.position.z;
        const halfWidth = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 1;
        const halfDepth = RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2 - 1;

        // Find the nearest uncollected ground item within range
        let nearestItem = null;
        let nearestDistSq = Infinity;

        for (let i = groundItems.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
          const item = groundItems[i];

          // Clean up collected items
          if (item.userData.collected) {
            scene.remove(item);
            item.traverse((child) => {
              if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
              if (child.material) {
                if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                else child.material.dispose();
              }
            });
            groundItems.splice(i, 1);
            continue;
          }

          // Move item toward player if it was being vacuumed
          if (item.userData.beingVacuumed) {
             const dx = playerX - item.position.x;
             const dy = (playerY + PLAYER_HEIGHT) - item.position.y;
             const dz = playerZ - item.position.z;
             const distSq = dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz;
             
             if (distSq < 0.25) {
                item.userData.collected = true;
                incomingBurgers--;
                addToStack(item.userData.menuItem);
             } else {
                const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq);
                const speed = 15;
                item.position.x += (dx / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
                item.position.y += (dy / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
                item.position.z += (dz / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
                item.scale.setScalar(Math.max(0.3, dist / 4));
             }
             continue;
          }

          // Apply simple physics (slow down and settle)
          const vel = item.userData.velocity;
          vel.x *= 0.95;
          vel.z *= 0.95;

          item.position.x += vel.x * deltaTime;
          item.position.z += vel.z * deltaTime;

          // Clamp to bounds (expanded for outdoor area)
          const leftBound = -RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 + 1;
          const rightBound = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 + 15;
          const halfDepth = RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2 - 1;

          if (item.position.x < leftBound) {
            item.position.x = leftBound;
            vel.x = 0;
          } else if (item.position.x > rightBound) {
            item.position.x = rightBound;
            vel.x = 0;
          }
          if (Math.abs(item.position.z) > halfDepth) {
            item.position.z = Math.sign(item.position.z) * halfDepth;
            vel.z = 0;
          }

          // Find nearest item to collect (one at a time)
          if (!item.userData.beingVacuumed && currentStackCount + incomingBurgers < maxCapacity) {
            const dxPlayer = playerX - item.position.x;
            const dzPlayer = playerZ - item.position.z;
            const itemDistSq = dxPlayer * dxPlayer + dzPlayer * dzPlayer;

            if (itemDistSq < vacuumRangeSq && itemDistSq < nearestDistSq) {
              nearestDistSq = itemDistSq;
              nearestItem = item;
            }
          }
        }

        // Collect one item at a time with delay (like depositing)
        if (nearestItem && currentStackCount + incomingBurgers < maxCapacity) {
          burgerCollectTimer += deltaTime;

          if (burgerCollectTimer >= BURGER_COLLECT_DELAY) {
            burgerCollectTimer = 0;

            // Mark as being collected
            nearestItem.userData.beingVacuumed = true;
            const menuItem = nearestItem.userData.menuItem;
            // Get the menu item
            incomingBurgers++;

            // Create flying item toward player
            const startPos = {
              x: nearestItem.position.x,
              y: nearestItem.position.y + 0.3,
              z: nearestItem.position.z,
            };

            const targetPos = {
              x: playerX,
              y: playerY + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
              z: playerZ,
            };

            createFlyingItem(
              startPos,
              targetPos,
              'burger',
              () => {
                nearestItem.userData.collected = true;
                incomingBurgers--;
                addToStack(menuItem);
                // Pass the menu item
              },
              true
            );

            // Hide the original item immediately
            nearestItem.visible = false;

            playSound('pickup_sound');
          }
        } else {
          burgerCollectTimer = 0;
        }
      }

      function updateMoneyZone(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.moneyZone;
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;

        const playerX = player.position.x;
        const playerY = player.position.y;
        const playerZ = player.position.z;

        // Automatically collect if there's money, no distance check needed
        if (groundMoneyItems.length > 0) {
          let collectedCount = 0;
          while (groundMoneyItems.length > 0) {
            const money = groundMoneyItems.pop();
            incomingMoney++;

            const startPos = {
              x: money.position.x,
              y: money.position.y + 0.3,
              z: money.position.z,
            };

            const targetPos = {
              x: playerX,
              y: playerY + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
              z: playerZ,
            };

            const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
            createFlyingItem(
              startPos,
              targetPos,
              'money',
              () => {
                modifyVaultBalance(moneyValue);
                if (collectedCount === 0) playSound('pickup_sound');
              },
              true
            );

            const gridIndex = money.userData.gridIndex;
            if (gridIndex >= 0 && gridIndex < moneyGridStacks.length) {
              const stack = moneyGridStacks[gridIndex];
              const billIndex = stack.bills.indexOf(money);
              if (billIndex > -1) {
                stack.bills.splice(billIndex, 1);
                stack.count = Math.max(0, stack.count - 1);
              }
            }

            scene.remove(money);
            money.traverse((child) => {
              if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
              if (child.material) {
                if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                else child.material.dispose();
              }
            });
            collectedCount++;
          }
          if (collectedCount > 0) playSound('pickup_sound');
        }

        // Animate money zone glow
        if (moneyZoneGlow) {
          const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.03;
          moneyZoneGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
        }

        // Animate coin indicator
        const signIndicator = moneyZoneMesh.userData.signIndicator;
        if (signIndicator) {
          signIndicator.position.y =
            signIndicator.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.15;
          signIndicator.rotation.y += deltaTime * 1.2;
        }
      }

      function updateCashierCashPile(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        if (
          !window.gameConfig.cashierStall ||
          window.gameConfig.cashierStall.deleted ||
          !cashierStallMesh
        )
          return;

        const playerX = player.position.x;
        const playerY = player.position.y;
        const playerZ = player.position.z;

        // Automatically collect cashier earnings
        if (cashierCashPile.length > 0) {
          let collectedCount = 0;
          while (cashierCashPile.length > 0) {
            const money = cashierCashPile.pop();
            incomingMoney++;

            const startPos = {
              x: money.position.x,
              y: money.position.y + 0.3,
              z: money.position.z,
            };

            const targetPos = {
              x: playerX,
              y: playerY + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
              z: playerZ,
            };

            const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
            createFlyingItem(
              startPos,
              targetPos,
              'money',
              () => {
                modifyVaultBalance(moneyValue);
                if (collectedCount === 0) playSound('pickup_sound');
              },
              true
            );

            scene.remove(money);
            money.traverse((child) => {
              if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
              if (child.material) {
                if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                else child.material.dispose();
              }
            });
            collectedCount++;
          }

          cashierEarnings = cashierCashPile.length;
          updateCashierUI();
          if (collectedCount > 0) playSound('pickup_sound');
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // RUSH HOUR SYSTEM
      // ============================================

      function updateRushHour(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit' || !window.gameConfig.tutorialCompleted) return;

        const rushConfig = window.gameConfig.rushHour;
        if (!rushConfig || !rushConfig.enabled) return;

        if (isRushHour) {
          // Rush hour is active
          rushHourTimer -= deltaTime;
          rushHourPulseAnim += deltaTime;

          // Update UI timer
          const timerEl = document.getElementById('rush-timer');
          if (timerEl) {
            timerEl.textContent = Math.ceil(rushHourTimer) + 's';
          }

          if (rushHourTimer <= 0) {
            // End rush hour
            isRushHour = false;
            rushHourCooldownTimer = rushConfig.cooldown;
            hideRushHourIndicator();
          }
        } else {
          // Cooldown between rush hours
          rushHourCooldownTimer -= deltaTime;

          if (rushHourCooldownTimer <= 0) {
            // Start rush hour!
            isRushHour = true;
            rushHourTimer = rushConfig.duration;
            rushHourPulseAnim = 0;
            showRushHourNotification();
            showRushHourIndicator();
          }
        }
      }

      function showRushHourIndicator() {
        const indicator = document.getElementById('rush-hour-indicator');
        if (indicator) {
          indicator.classList.remove('hidden');
        }
      }

      function hideRushHourIndicator() {
        const indicator = document.getElementById('rush-hour-indicator');
        if (indicator) {
          indicator.classList.add('hidden');
        }
      }

      function showRushHourNotification() {
        const notification = document.getElementById('rush-notification');
        if (!notification) return;

        // Update subtitle with actual tip bonus
        const rushConfig = window.gameConfig.rushHour;
        const bonusPercent = Math.round((rushConfig.tipBonus - 1) * 100);
        const subtitle = notification.querySelector('.notification-subtitle');
        if (subtitle) {
          subtitle.textContent = t('rush.subtitle', { bonus: bonusPercent });
        }

        notification.classList.add('show');
        playSound('upgrade_sound');

        // Hide after delay
        setTimeout(() => {
          notification.classList.remove('show');
        }, 2500);
      }

      function getCustomerSpawnRate() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
        const rushConfig = window.gameConfig.rushHour;
        const staffConfig = window.gameConfig.staffHireTile;

        let spawnRate = config.customerSpawnRate;
        
        if (staffConfig && staffConfig.extraStaffHired) {
            spawnRate = 0.5; // 2 customers per second
        } else if (staffConfig && staffConfig.staffHired) {
            spawnRate = 1.0; // 1 customer per second
        }

        // Faster spawns during rush hour
        if (isRushHour && rushConfig && rushConfig.enabled) {
          spawnRate = spawnRate / rushConfig.spawnMultiplier;
        }

        return spawnRate;
      }

      function getRushHourTipMultiplier() {
        const rushConfig = window.gameConfig.rushHour;
        const plantBonus = 1 + (window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades?.plants?.level || 0) * 0.05;

        if (isRushHour && rushConfig && rushConfig.enabled) {
          return rushConfig.tipBonus * plantBonus;
        }

        return 1;
      }

      function updateCustomerQueue(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
        if (!config || config.deleted || !cashierStallMesh) return;

        // Spawn new customers (affected by rush hour)
        customerSpawnTimer += deltaTime;
        let activeCustomers = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < customerQueue.length; i++) {
          const state = customerQueue[i].state;
          if (state === 'waiting' || state === 'walking') activeCustomers++;
        }

        // Use dynamic spawn rate (faster during rush hour)
        const currentSpawnRate = getCustomerSpawnRate() * 1.5; // Slightly slower spawn rate to reduce potential lag
        const staffConfig = window.gameConfig.staffHireTile;
        const baseMax = (staffConfig && staffConfig.extraStaffHired) ? config.maxCustomers * 2 : config.maxCustomers;
        const maxCustomers = isRushHour ? baseMax + 3 : baseMax;
        // More customers during rush

        if (
          customerSpawnTimer >= currentSpawnRate &&
          activeCustomers < maxCustomers &&
          !isTotalCustomerCapReached()
        ) {
          customerSpawnTimer = 0;
          spawnCustomer();
        }

        const now = Date.now();
        const cameraPos = camera.position;

        // Update each customer
        for (let i = customerQueue.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
          const customer = customerQueue[i];
          const mesh = customer.mesh;
          const state = customer.state;

          // Simple collision avoidance with player
          const dxP = player.position.x - mesh.position.x;
          const dzP = player.position.z - mesh.position.z;
          const distSqP = dxP * dxP + dzP * dzP;
          if (distSqP < 2) {
            const distP = Math.sqrt(distSqP) || 0.001;
            const push = (2 - distP) * 0.1;
            mesh.position.x -= (dxP / distP) * push;
            mesh.position.z -= (dzP / distP) * push;
          }

          // Simple collision avoidance with other customers
          customerQueue.forEach((other, j) => {
             if (i === j) return;
             const dxO = other.mesh.position.x - mesh.position.x;
             const dzO = other.mesh.position.z - mesh.position.z;
             const distSqO = dxO * dxO + dzO * dzO;
             if (distSqO < 1.5) {
                const distO = Math.sqrt(distSqO) || 0.001;
                const push = (1.5 - distO) * 0.1;
                mesh.position.x -= (dxO / distO) * push;
                mesh.position.z -= (dzO / distO) * push;
             }
          });

          // Make emoji always face camera
          const emojiMesh = mesh.userData.emojiMesh;
          if (emojiMesh) {
            updateCustomerEmojiVisibility(customer, now);
            emojiMesh.lookAt(cameraPos);
            emojiMesh.position.y = 2.5 * (1 + 0.5 + 0.125) + Math.sin(now * 0.005 + i) * 0.1;
          }

          // Get or create squish state
          const squish = mesh.userData.squishState || {
            scaleY: 1,
            scaleXZ: 1,
            targetScaleY: 1,
            targetScaleXZ: 1,
          };

          if (state === 'entering') {
            switchAnimation(mesh, 'walk');
            const dx = customer.targetX - mesh.position.x;
            const dz = customer.targetZ - mesh.position.z;
            const distSq = dx * dx + dz * dz;

            if (distSq > 0.05) {
              const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq);
              const speed = 3.5;
              mesh.position.x += (dx / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
              mesh.position.z += (dz / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
              mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(dx, dz);
            } else {
              // Now move to the actual queue
              customer.state = 'walking';
              customer.targetX = customer.finalTargetX;
              customer.targetZ = customer.finalTargetZ;
            }
          } else if (state === 'walking') {
            switchAnimation(mesh, 'walk');
            const dx = customer.targetX - mesh.position.x;
            const dz = customer.targetZ - mesh.position.z;
            const distSq = dx * dx + dz * dz;

            if (distSq > 0.01) {
              const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq);
              const speed = 3.5; // Reduced from 5 to reduce lag and make it slower
              mesh.position.x += (dx / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
              mesh.position.z += (dz / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
              mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(dx, dz);
              mesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.01)) * 0.1;

              // Squishy walk animation
              const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.012 + i) * 0.5 + 0.5;
              squish.targetScaleY = 0.9 + walkCycle * 0.2;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.1 - walkCycle * 0.2;
            } else {
              customer.state = 'waiting';
              mesh.position.y = 0;
              mesh.rotation.y = -Math.PI;
              // Landing squish
              squish.scaleY = 0.8;
              squish.scaleXZ = 1.2;
            }
          } else if (state === 'waiting') {
            switchAnimation(mesh, 'idleFoldArms');
            mesh.position.y = Math.sin(now * 0.003 + i) * 0.05;
            // Idle breathing squish
            const breathe = Math.sin(now * 0.004 + i * 0.5);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + breathe * 0.04;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - breathe * 0.03;

            customer.waitTime += deltaTime;
            // Check wait time for mood emojis
            const isVIP = customer.isVIP;
            if (customer.waitTime > 10) {
              updateCustomerEmoji(customer, isVIP ? '😤' : '😠');
            } else if (customer.waitTime > 5) {
              updateCustomerEmoji(customer, isVIP ? '🙄' : '😐');
            } else {
              // Maintain the desired item emoji if still early
              updateCustomerEmoji(customer, customer.desiredItem ? customer.desiredItem.emoji : (isVIP ? '⭐' : '🙂'));
            }
          } else if (state === 'served') {
            switchAnimation(mesh, 'idle');
            customer.waitTime += deltaTime;

            if (mesh.userData.burgerMesh) {
              mesh.userData.burgerMesh.visible = true;
            }
            updateCustomerEmoji(customer, customer.isVIP ? '🤩' : '🤤');

            if (customer.waitTime > 0.3) {
              if (customer.assignedTable) {
                customer.state = 'walkingToTable';
                customer.targetX = customer.assignedTable.tableData.x;
                customer.targetZ = customer.assignedTable.tableData.z + 1.5;
              } else {
                removeCustomer(customer);
              }
            }
          } else if (state === 'walkingToTable') {
            switchAnimation(mesh, 'walk');
            updateCustomerEmoji(customer, customer.isVIP ? '🤩' : '😊');

            const isCarryingOrder =
              mesh.userData && mesh.userData.burgerMesh && mesh.userData.burgerMesh.visible;
            if (!isCarryingOrder) {
              switchAnimation(mesh, 'walk');
            }

            const dx = customer.targetX - mesh.position.x;
            const dz = customer.targetZ - mesh.position.z;
            const distSq = dx * dx + dz * dz;

            if (distSq > 0.09) {
              const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq);
              const speed = 4;
              mesh.position.x += (dx / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
              mesh.position.z += (dz / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
              mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(dx, dz);
              mesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.01)) * 0.1;
            } else {
              customer.state = 'eating';
              customer.eatingTime = 0;
              mesh.position.y = 0;
              mesh.rotation.y = Math.PI;

              if (mesh.userData.burgerMesh) {
                const hand = mesh.getObjectByName('hand_l');
                hand.remove(mesh.userData.burgerMesh);
                const head = mesh.getObjectByName('head');
                head.add(mesh.userData.burgerMesh);
                mesh.userData.burgerMesh.position.set(0, 0, 0.2);
                mesh.userData.burgerMesh.rotation.set(0, 0, 0);
                // mesh.userData.burgerMesh.position.set(0, 1.2, -0.8);
              }
            }
          } else if (state === 'eating') {
            switchAnimation(mesh, 'idle');
            updateCustomerEmoji(customer, customer.isVIP ? '👑' : '😋');
            customer.eatingTime += deltaTime;
            mesh.position.y = Math.sin(now * 0.008) * 0.03;

            if (mesh.userData.burgerMesh) {
              const eatProgress = customer.eatingTime / EATING_TIME;
              const burgerScale = Math.max(0.1, 0.8 * (1 - eatProgress));
              mesh.userData.burgerMesh.scale.setScalar(burgerScale);
              // mesh.userData.burgerMesh.position.y = 1.2 + Math.sin(now * 0.02) * 0.05;
            }

            if (customer.eatingTime >= EATING_TIME) {
              if (mesh.userData.burgerMesh) {
                mesh.userData.burgerMesh.visible = false;
              }

              updateCustomerEmoji(customer, customer.isVIP ? '🌟' : '😄');

              if (customer.assignedTable) {
                const shouldLeaveTrash = window.gameConfig.settings.customersLeaveTrash !== false;

                if (shouldLeaveTrash) {
                  customer.assignedTable.tableData.hasTrash = true;

                  const configTable = window.gameConfig.diningTables.find(
                    (t) => t.id === customer.assignedTable.tableData.id
                  );
                  if (configTable) {
                    configTable.hasTrash = true;
                  }

                  if (customer.assignedTable.trashMesh) {
                    customer.assignedTable.trashMesh.visible = true;
                  }
                }

                customer.assignedTable.tableData.occupied = false;

                const configTable = window.gameConfig.diningTables.find(
                  (t) => t.id === customer.assignedTable.tableData.id
                );
                if (configTable) {
                  configTable.occupied = false;
                }
              }

              customer.state = 'walkingToDoor';
              customer.targetX = -RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 + 2;
              customer.targetZ = 10;
              customer.leaveEmoji = customer.isVIP ? '🌟' : '😄';
            }
          } else if (state === 'walkingToDoor') {
            switchAnimation(mesh, 'walk');
            if (customer.leaveEmoji) {
              updateCustomerEmoji(customer, customer.leaveEmoji);
            }

            const dx = customer.targetX - mesh.position.x;
            const dz = customer.targetZ - mesh.position.z;
            const distSq = dx * dx + dz * dz;

            if (distSq > 1) {
              const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq);
              const speed = 3.5; // Reduced from 5 to reduce lag
              mesh.position.x += (dx / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
              mesh.position.z += (dz / dist) * speed * deltaTime;
              mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(dx, dz);
              mesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.01)) * 0.1;

              if (squish) {
                const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.012 + i) * 0.5 + 0.5;
                squish.targetScaleY = 0.9 + walkCycle * 0.2;
                squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.1 - walkCycle * 0.2;
              }
            } else {
              customer.state = 'leaving';
              customer.targetX = -RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 10;
            }
          } else if (state === 'leaving') {
            switchAnimation(mesh, 'walk');
            if (customer.leaveEmoji) {
              updateCustomerEmoji(customer, customer.leaveEmoji);
            } else {
              updateCustomerEmoji(customer, customer.isVIP ? '😒' : '😞');
            }

            const dx = customer.targetX - mesh.position.x;
            const speed = 4; // Reduced from 6 to reduce lag
            mesh.position.x += Math.sign(dx) * speed * deltaTime;
            mesh.rotation.y = dx > 0 ? Math.PI / 2 : -Math.PI / 2;
            mesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.01)) * 0.1;

            if (Math.abs(mesh.position.x) > RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 + 5) {
              scene.remove(mesh);
              mesh.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                  else child.material.dispose();
                }
              });
              customerQueue.splice(i, 1);
            }
          }

          // Apply squishy interpolation to customer
          if (squish) {
            const squishSpeed = 10 * deltaTime;
            squish.scaleY += (squish.targetScaleY - squish.scaleY) * squishSpeed;
            squish.scaleXZ += (squish.targetScaleXZ - squish.scaleXZ) * squishSpeed;
            mesh.scale.set(squish.scaleXZ, squish.scaleY, squish.scaleXZ);
          }
        }

        // Serve first waiting customer
        const staffHired = staffConfig && staffConfig.staffHired;
        const staffHired2 = staffConfig && staffConfig.extraStaffHired;
        const canServe = isInCashierZone || staffHired || staffHired2;

        const availableTableForServing = findAvailableDiningTable();

        const waitingCustomers = customerQueue
          .filter((c) => c.state === 'waiting')
          .sort((a, b) => a.queuePosition - b.queuePosition);
        const firstWaiting = waitingCustomers[0] || null;
        const secondWaiting = waitingCustomers[1] || null;

        const servedCustomers = new Set();

        const maxMoney =
          (config.maxMoney || 50) + (window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades?.cashpile || 0) * 20;

        const vaultUpgrades = window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades || {};
        const serveBonus = 1 - (vaultUpgrades.serve || 0) * 0.1;
        const currentServeTime = Math.max(0.1, config.serveTime * serveBonus);

        if (
          firstWaiting &&
          cashierBurgerStack.length > 0 &&
          canServe &&
          cashierCashPile.length < maxMoney
        ) {
          cashierServeTimer += deltaTime;

          if (cashierServeTimer >= currentServeTime) {
            cashierServeTimer = 0;

            const servedMenuItem = removeBurgerFromCashier();

            if (availableTableForServing) {
              firstWaiting.assignedTable = availableTableForServing;
              availableTableForServing.tableData.occupied = true;

              const configTable = window.gameConfig.diningTables.find(
                (t) => t.id === availableTableForServing.tableData.id
              );
              if (configTable) configTable.occupied = true;
            }

            firstWaiting.state = 'served';
            firstWaiting.waitTime = 0;
            firstWaiting.satisfied = true;
            servedCustomers.add(firstWaiting);

            updateCashierUI();

            // Calculate how many paper money bills the customer pays
            if (!firstWaiting.alreadyPaid) {
              // Use the served item's value, VIP multiplier, and rush hour bonus
              const vipConfig = window.gameConfig.vipCustomers || {
                tipMultiplier: 3,
              };
              const vipMultiplier = firstWaiting.isVIP ? vipConfig.tipMultiplier : 1;
              const rushMultiplier = getRushHourTipMultiplier();
              const prestigeMultiplier = getPrestigeProfitMultiplier();
              const tipMultiplier = vipMultiplier * rushMultiplier * prestigeMultiplier;
              // Use the menu item's value, or fallback to default
              const basePrice =
                servedMenuItem && servedMenuItem.value
                  ? servedMenuItem.value
                  : window.gameConfig.resources.itemValue;
              const itemPrice = basePrice * tipMultiplier;
              const paperMoneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
              const billCount = Math.ceil(itemPrice / paperMoneyValue);

              // Spawn multiple paper money bills with staggered timing
              for (let billIndex = 0; billIndex < billCount; billIndex++) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                  // Slightly randomize start position for each bill
                  const offsetX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
                  const offsetZ = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;

                  const moneyStartPos = {
                    x: firstWaiting.mesh.position.x + offsetX,
                    y: 1.5 + billIndex * 0.15,
                    z: firstWaiting.mesh.position.z + offsetZ,
                  };
                  
                  // Target the currency icon in the upper right
                  const targetPos = {
                    x: player.position.x,
                    y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + (playerStack.length + moneyStack.length) * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                    z: player.position.z,
                  };

                  createFlyingItem(
                    moneyStartPos,
                    targetPos,
                    'money',
                    () => {
                      const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
                      modifyVaultBalance(moneyValue);
                      if (billIndex === 0) {
                        window.gameConfig.tutorialHasCollectedMoney = true;
                      }
                      updateCashierUI();
                    },
                    true
                  );

                  if (billIndex === 0) {
                    playSound('sell_sound');
                  }
                }, billIndex * 80);
              }
            } else {
              updateCashierUI();
            }
          }
        } else {
          cashierServeTimer = 0;
        }

        const secondStaffActive = staffHired2;
        if (
          secondStaffActive &&
          secondWaiting &&
          cashierBurgerStack.length > 0 &&
          canServe &&
          cashierCashPile.length < maxMoney
        ) {
          cashierServeTimer2 += deltaTime;

          if (cashierServeTimer2 >= currentServeTime) {
            cashierServeTimer2 = 0;
            const servedMenuItem = removeBurgerFromCashier();

            if (availableTableForServing) {
              secondWaiting.assignedTable = availableTableForServing;
              availableTableForServing.tableData.occupied = true;

              const configTable = window.gameConfig.diningTables.find(
                (t) => t.id === availableTableForServing.tableData.id
              );
              if (configTable) configTable.occupied = true;
            }

            secondWaiting.state = 'served';
            secondWaiting.waitTime = 0;
            secondWaiting.satisfied = true;
            servedCustomers.add(secondWaiting);

            updateCashierUI();

            if (!secondWaiting.alreadyPaid) {
              const vipConfig = window.gameConfig.vipCustomers || {
                tipMultiplier: 3,
              };
              const vipMultiplier = secondWaiting.isVIP ? vipConfig.tipMultiplier : 1;
              const rushMultiplier = getRushHourTipMultiplier();
              const prestigeMultiplier = getPrestigeProfitMultiplier();
              const tipMultiplier = vipMultiplier * rushMultiplier * prestigeMultiplier;
              const basePrice =
                servedMenuItem && servedMenuItem.value
                  ? servedMenuItem.value
                  : window.gameConfig.resources.itemValue;
              const itemPrice = basePrice * tipMultiplier;
              const paperMoneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
              const billCount = Math.ceil(itemPrice / paperMoneyValue);

              let completedCount = 0;
              for (let billIndex = 0; billIndex < billCount; billIndex++) {
                setTimeout(() => {
                  const offsetX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
                  const offsetZ = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;

                  const moneyStartPos = {
                    x: secondWaiting.mesh.position.x + offsetX,
                    y: 1.5 + billIndex * 0.15,
                    z: secondWaiting.mesh.position.z + offsetZ,
                  };
                  
                  // Target the player/currency icon
                  const targetPos = {
                    x: player.position.x,
                    y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + (playerStack.length + moneyStack.length) * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                    z: player.position.z,
                  };

                  createFlyingItem(
                    moneyStartPos,
                    targetPos,
                    'money',
                    () => {
                      const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
                      modifyVaultBalance(moneyValue);
                      completedCount++;
                      updateCashierUI();
                    },
                    true
                  );

                  if (billIndex === 0) {
                    playSound('sell_sound');
                  }
                }, billIndex * 80);
              }
            }
          }
        } else {
          cashierServeTimer2 = 0;
        }

        if (servedCustomers.size > 0) {
          const remaining = customerQueue
            .filter((c) => (c.state === 'waiting' || c.state === 'walking') && !servedCustomers.has(c))
            .sort((a, b) => a.queuePosition - b.queuePosition);

          for (let j = 0; j < remaining.length; j++) {
            const c = remaining[j];
            c.queuePosition = j;
            const target = getCustomerQueueTarget(config, c.queuePosition);
            c.targetX = target.x;
            c.targetZ = target.z;
            c.state = 'walking';
          }
        }
      }

      function updateSpendZone(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.spendZone;
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;

        // Check if player is in spend zone (rectangular area)
        isInSpendZone = isPlayerInZone(config);

        // Spend money when in zone
        if (isInSpendZone && vaultBalance > 0) {
          spendTimer += deltaTime;

          if (spendTimer >= SPEND_DELAY) {
            spendTimer = 0;

            if (moneyStack.length > 0) {
              // Remove from stack visually
              const item = moneyStack.pop();
              player.remove(item);
              currentMoneyCount = moneyStack.length;
              updateMoneyStackUI();

              // Throw money toward spend zone gem
              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y:
                  player.position.y +
                  PLAYER_HEIGHT +
                  playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT +
                  moneyStack.length * MONEY_STACK_HEIGHT,
                z: player.position.z,
              };

              const targetPos = {
                x: config.x,
                y: 0.9,
                // Gem height
                z: config.z,
              };

              // Create flying money
              createFlyingItem(
                startPos,
                targetPos,
                'money',
                () => {
                  // Add to actual currency when money lands
                  modifyVaultBalance(window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10);
                  playSound('sell_sound');
                },
                true
              );

              // Dispose of original item
              item.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                  else child.material.dispose();
                }
              });
            }
          }
        } else {
          spendTimer = 0;
        }

        // Animate spend zone glow
        if (spendZoneGlow) {
          const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.005) * 0.04;
          spendZoneGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
        }

        // Animate gem indicator (bobbing and rotating)
        const gemIndicator = spendZoneMesh.userData.gemIndicator;
        if (gemIndicator) {
          gemIndicator.position.y =
            gemIndicator.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.15;
          gemIndicator.rotation.y += deltaTime * 1.5;
        }
      }

      function updateTrashBin(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.trashBin;
        if (!config || config.deleted || !trashBinMesh) return;

        const binX = config.x || 18;
        const binZ = config.z || 5;
        const binRadius = config.radius || 2;

        // Check if player is near trash bin
        const dx = player.position.x - binX;
        const dz = player.position.z - binZ;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);

        isInTrashBinZone = dist < binRadius;

        // Dispose of items when in zone (burgers first, then money)
        if (isInTrashBinZone && currentStackCount > 0) {
          trashBinDisposeTimer += deltaTime;

          if (trashBinDisposeTimer >= TRASH_DISPOSE_DELAY) {
            trashBinDisposeTimer = 0;

            // Dispose of burgers first
            if (playerStack.length > 0) {
              const item = playerStack.pop();
              player.remove(item);
              currentStackCount = playerStack.length;
              updateStackUI();

              // Throw item into trash bin
              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                z: player.position.z,
              };

              const targetPos = {
                x: binX,
                y: 2.5,
                // Into the bin
                z: binZ,
              };

              createFlyingItem(
                startPos,
                targetPos,
                'burger',
                () => {
                  // Item destroyed - maybe play a sound
                  playSound('pickup_sound');
                },
                true
              );

              // Dispose of original item
              item.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                    child.material.forEach((mat) => mat.dispose());
                  } else {
                    child.material.dispose();
                  }
                }
              });
            }
          }
        } else {
          trashBinDisposeTimer = 0;
        }

        // Animate trash bin glow
        if (trashBinGlow) {
          const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
          trashBinGlow.scale.setScalar(pulseScale);

          // Change color based on player having items
          if (currentStackCount > 0 || currentMoneyCount > 0) {
            trashBinGlow.material.color.setHex(0xe74c3c);
            // Red when player has items
            trashBinGlow.material.opacity = 0.7;
          } else {
            trashBinGlow.material.color.setHex(0x7f8c8d);
            // Gray when empty
            trashBinGlow.material.opacity = 0.4;
          }
        }

        // Animate trash icon (emoji always faces camera)
        const trashIcon = trashBinMesh && trashBinMesh.userData && trashBinMesh.userData.trashIcon;
        if (trashIcon) {
          trashIcon.position.y = trashIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          trashIcon.lookAt(camera.position);
        }
      }

      function updateBankVault(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.bankVault;
        if (!config || config.deleted || !bankVaultMesh) return;

        const vaultX = config.x;
        const vaultZ = config.z + config.depth / 2 + 1.5;
        // Deposit zone in front

        // Check if player is in vault deposit zone
        const inZoneX = Math.abs(player.position.x - vaultX) < config.width / 2 + 1;
        const inZoneZ = Math.abs(player.position.z - vaultZ) < 1.5;
        isInBankVaultZone = inZoneX && inZoneZ;

        // Deposit money into vault when in zone
        if (isInBankVaultZone && currentMoneyCount > 0) {
          bankVaultDepositTimer += deltaTime;

          if (bankVaultDepositTimer >= VAULT_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
            bankVaultDepositTimer = 0;

            if (moneyStack.length > 0) {
              const item = moneyStack.pop();
              player.remove(item);
              currentMoneyCount = moneyStack.length;
              updateMoneyStackUI();

              // Throw money toward vault
              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y:
                  player.position.y +
                  PLAYER_HEIGHT +
                  playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT +
                  moneyStack.length * MONEY_STACK_HEIGHT,
                z: player.position.z,
              };

              const targetPos = {
                x: config.x,
                y: 1.5,
                z: config.z + config.depth / 2,
              };

              createFlyingItem(
                startPos,
                targetPos,
                'money',
                () => {
                  // Add to vault balance
                  const depositValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
                  vaultBalance += depositValue;
                  window.gameConfig.bankVault.balance = vaultBalance;
                  updateVaultUI();
                  playSound('sell_sound');
                },
                true
              );

              // Dispose of original item
              item.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                  else child.material.dispose();
                }
              });
            }
          }
        } else {
          bankVaultDepositTimer = 0;
        }

        // Animate vault glow
        if (bankVaultGlow) {
          const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
          bankVaultGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);

          // Gold glow when player has money
          if (currentMoneyCount > 0) {
            bankVaultGlow.material.color.setHex(0xf1c40f);
            bankVaultGlow.material.opacity = 0.6;
          } else {
            bankVaultGlow.material.color.setHex(0xbdc3c7);
            bankVaultGlow.material.opacity = 0.3;
          }
        }

        // Animate vault icon
        const vaultIcon = bankVaultMesh?.userData?.vaultIcon;
        if (vaultIcon) {
          vaultIcon.position.y = vaultIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.15;
          vaultIcon.lookAt(camera.position);
        }

        // Rotate vault door handle slowly
        const handle = bankVaultMesh?.userData?.handle;
        if (handle) {
          handle.rotation.z += deltaTime * 0.5;
        }
      }

      function updateSmokeParticles(deltaTime) {
        for (let i = smokeParticles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
          const particle = smokeParticles[i];

          particle.life -= deltaTime;

          if (particle.life <= 0) {
            scene.remove(particle.mesh);
            particle.mesh.geometry.dispose();
            particle.mesh.material.dispose();
            smokeParticles.splice(i, 1);
            continue;
          }

          const mesh = particle.mesh;
          mesh.position.y += particle.velocityY * deltaTime;
          mesh.position.x += particle.velocityX * deltaTime;
          mesh.position.z += particle.velocityZ * deltaTime;

          const lifeRatio = particle.life / particle.maxLife;
          const scale = 1 + (1 - lifeRatio) * 2;
          mesh.scale.setScalar(scale);
          mesh.material.opacity = lifeRatio * 0.6;
        }
      }

      function updateDustParticles(deltaTime) {
        for (let i = dustParticles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
          const particle = dustParticles[i];

          particle.life -= deltaTime;

          if (particle.life <= 0) {
            scene.remove(particle.mesh);
            particle.mesh.geometry.dispose();
            particle.mesh.material.dispose();
            dustParticles.splice(i, 1);
            continue;
          }

          const mesh = particle.mesh;
          mesh.position.y += particle.velocityY * deltaTime;
          mesh.position.x += particle.velocityX * deltaTime;
          mesh.position.z += particle.velocityZ * deltaTime;

          // Slow down horizontal movement
          particle.velocityX *= 0.95;
          particle.velocityZ *= 0.95;

          const lifeRatio = particle.life / particle.maxLife;
          const scale = particle.baseScale * (0.5 + lifeRatio * 0.5);
          mesh.scale.setScalar(scale);
          mesh.material.opacity = lifeRatio * 0.5;
        }
      }

      function spawnDustParticle(x, y, z, moveX, moveZ) {
        // Limit max dust particles for performance
        if (dustParticles.length > performanceSettings.maxDustParticles) return;

        const dustGeom = getCachedGeometry('dustGeom', () => new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 6, 6));
        const dustMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
          color: 0xffffff,
          // Tan/beige color matching floor
          transparent: true,
          opacity: 0.5,
          depthWrite: false,
        });
        const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(dustGeom, dustMat);

        // Spawn at player's feet with slight random offset
        mesh.position.set(
          x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
          y + 0.1 + Math.random() * 0.2,
          z + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5
        );

        const baseScale = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.4;
        mesh.scale.setScalar(baseScale);

        scene.add(mesh);

        const maxLife = 0.4 + Math.random() * 0.3;
        dustParticles.push({
          mesh: mesh,
          life: maxLife,
          maxLife: maxLife,
          baseScale: baseScale * 2.5,
          velocityY: 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.5,
          // Dust moves opposite to player movement direction
          velocityX: -moveX * 0.3 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
          velocityZ: -moveZ * 0.3 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
        });
      }

      function createSmokeParticlesAt(x, y, z) {
        const particleCount = 15;
        const geom = getCachedGeometry('smokeGeom', () => new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.5, 8, 8));
        const mat = getCachedMaterial(
          'smokeMat',
          () =>
            new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
              color: 0xcccccc,
              transparent: true,
              opacity: 0.6,
            })
        );

        for (let i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {
          const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geom, mat);

          // Random offset from center
          const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
          const radius = Math.random() * 1.5;
          mesh.position.set(
            x + Math.cos(angle) * radius,
            y + Math.random() * 0.5,
            z + Math.sin(angle) * radius
          );

          // Randomize scale a bit
          mesh.scale.setScalar(0.8 + Math.random() * 0.6);

          scene.add(mesh);

          const maxLife = 1 + Math.random() * 0.5;
          smokeParticles.push({
            mesh: mesh,
            life: maxLife,
