                if (!window.gameConfig.vipCustomers) window.gameConfig.vipCustomers = {};
                window.gameConfig.vipCustomers.spawnChance = value;
              },
            },
            'VIP Tip Multiplier': {
              key: 'gameConfig.vipCustomers.tipMultiplier',
              type: 'slider',
              min: 1,
              max: 5,
              step: 0.5,
              onChange: (value) => {
                if (!window.gameConfig.vipCustomers) window.gameConfig.vipCustomers = {};
                window.gameConfig.vipCustomers.tipMultiplier = value;
              },
            },
            'Rush Hour Enabled': {
              key: 'gameConfig.rushHour.enabled',
              type: 'checkbox',
              onChange: (value) => {
                if (!window.gameConfig.rushHour) window.gameConfig.rushHour = {};
                window.gameConfig.rushHour.enabled = value;
                if (!value) {
                  isRushHour = false;
                  hideRushHourIndicator();
                }
              },
            },
            'Rush Duration (sec)': {
              key: 'gameConfig.rushHour.duration',
              type: 'slider',
              min: 15,
              max: 60,
              step: 5,
              onChange: (value) => {
                if (!window.gameConfig.rushHour) window.gameConfig.rushHour = {};
                window.gameConfig.rushHour.duration = value;
              },
            },
            'Rush Cooldown (sec)': {
              key: 'gameConfig.rushHour.cooldown',
              type: 'slider',
              min: 30,
              max: 120,
              step: 10,
              onChange: (value) => {
                if (!window.gameConfig.rushHour) window.gameConfig.rushHour = {};
                window.gameConfig.rushHour.cooldown = value;
              },
            },
            'Rush Spawn Speed': {
              key: 'gameConfig.rushHour.spawnMultiplier',
              type: 'slider',
              min: 1.5,
              max: 4,
              step: 0.5,
              onChange: (value) => {
                if (!window.gameConfig.rushHour) window.gameConfig.rushHour = {};
                window.gameConfig.rushHour.spawnMultiplier = value;
              },
            },
            'Rush Tip Bonus': {
              key: 'gameConfig.rushHour.tipBonus',
              type: 'slider',
              min: 1,
              max: 2,
              step: 0.1,
              onChange: (value) => {
                if (!window.gameConfig.rushHour) window.gameConfig.rushHour = {};
                window.gameConfig.rushHour.tipBonus = value;
              },
            },
            'Max Total Customers': {
              key: 'gameConfig.settings.maxTotalCustomers',
              type: 'slider',
              min: 20,
              max: 120,
              step: 5,
              onChange: (value) => {
                window.gameConfig.settings.maxTotalCustomers = value;
              },
            },
            'Dining Floor Tile': {
              key: 'gameConfig.settings.diningFloorAsset',
              type: 'string',
              onChange: (value) => {
                window.gameConfig.settings.diningFloorAsset = value;
                lib.log('Dining floor asset changed to: ' + value + ' (reload to see changes)');
              },
            },
            'Kitchen Floor Tile': {
              key: 'gameConfig.settings.kitchenFloorAsset',
              type: 'string',
              onChange: (value) => {
                window.gameConfig.settings.kitchenFloorAsset = value;
                lib.log('Kitchen floor asset changed to: ' + value + ' (reload to see changes)');
              },
            },
            'Outdoor Floor Color': {
              key: 'gameConfig.settings.outdoorFloorColor',
              type: 'color',
              onChange: (value) => {
                window.gameConfig.settings.outdoorFloorColor = value;
                lib.log('Outdoor floor color changed to: ' + value + ' (reload to see changes)');
              },
            },
            'Starting Cash': {
              key: 'gameConfig.settings.startingCash',
              type: 'slider',
              min: 0,
              max: 10000,
              step: 100,
              onChange: (value) => {
                window.gameConfig.settings.startingCash = value;
                if (gameMode === 'edit' || vaultBalance === 0) {
                  vaultBalance = value;
                  currentCurrency = value;
                  if (window.gameConfig.bankVault) window.gameConfig.bankVault.balance = value;
                  window.gameConfig.currency = value;
                  updateVaultUI();
                  updateCurrencyUI();
                  updateUpgradeUI();
                }
              },
            },
          },
        });
      }

      async function run(mode) {
        lib.log('run() called. Mode: ' + mode);
        gameMode = mode;

        // Initialize loading progress (count total steps)
        totalLoadSteps = 11;
        // Adjust based on actual steps
        completedLoadSteps = 0;

        await initI18n();

        // Setup game parameters UI
        setupGameParameters();
        updateLoadingProgress(1, 'loading.setup');

        // Detect device type
        const isTouchDevice = lib.shouldUseTouchControls();
        isLowPerfDevice = !!isTouchDevice;
        performanceSettings.pixelRatioCap = isLowPerfDevice ? 1 : 1.5;
        performanceSettings.enableShadows = !isLowPerfDevice;
        performanceSettings.shadowMapSize = isLowPerfDevice ? 256 : 512;
        performanceSettings.maxDustParticles = isLowPerfDevice ? 4 : 7;
        performanceSettings.cityLightUpdateInterval = isLowPerfDevice ? 0.25 : 0;
        if (!isTouchDevice) {
          document.body.classList.add('desktop');
        }

        // Apply mode-specific styles
        if (mode === 'edit') {
          document.body.classList.add('edit-mode');
        } else {
          document.body.classList.remove('edit-mode');
        }

        // Initialize Three.js
        updateLoadingProgress(2, 'loading.initGraphics');
        initThreeJS();

        // Create game world
        updateLoadingProgress(3, 'loading.building');
        createGround();
        createSellZone();
        createMoneyZone();
        createSpendZone();

        // Load 3D stickman model before creating characters or loading state
        updateLoadingProgress(4, 'loading.loadingModel');
        try {
          await loadStickmanModel();
        } catch (e) {
          lib.log('Failed to load stickman model, using fallback: ' + e.message);
        }

        // Load saved game state first (play mode only)
        if (mode === 'play') {
          await loadGameState();
        }

        const step = window.gameConfig.tutorialStep || 0;

        if (
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile &&
          (!window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked || mode === 'edit')
        ) {
          if (step >= 2 || mode === 'edit') createCashierTile();
        }
        if (
          !window.gameConfig.cashierTile ||
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked ||
          mode === 'edit'
        ) {
          createCashierStall();
        }

        if (
          window.gameConfig.driveThruTile &&
          (!window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.unlocked || mode === 'edit')
        ) {
          if (step >= 4 || mode === 'edit') createDriveThruTile();
        }
        if (
          !window.gameConfig.driveThruTile ||
          window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.unlocked ||
          mode === 'edit'
        ) {
          createDriveThruBooth();
        }

        if (step >= 3 || mode === 'edit') createStaffHireTile();
        if (step >= 4 || mode === 'edit') createCleanerStaffTile();
        if (step >= 4 || mode === 'edit') createRunnerStaffTile();
        if (window.gameConfig.driveThruTile?.unlocked) {
           createDriveThruStaffTile();
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.staffHired || window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.extraStaff1Hired || window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.extraStaff2Hired) {
           createHiredDriveThruStaff();
        }

        if (
          window.gameConfig.trashTile &&
          (!window.gameConfig.trashTile.unlocked || mode === 'edit')
        ) {
          if (step >= 3 || mode === 'edit') createTrashTile();
        }
        if (
          !window.gameConfig.trashTile ||
          window.gameConfig.trashTile.unlocked ||
          mode === 'edit'
        ) {
          createTrashBin();
        }

        if (
          window.gameConfig.vaultTile &&
          (!window.gameConfig.vaultTile.unlocked || mode === 'edit')
        ) {
          if (step >= 4 || mode === 'edit') createVaultTile();
        }
        if (
          !window.gameConfig.vaultTile ||
          window.gameConfig.vaultTile.unlocked ||
          mode === 'edit'
        ) {
          createBankVault();
        }

        if (!window.gameConfig.fountainTile) {
          window.gameConfig.fountainTile = {
            x: -18,
            z: -5,
            width: 4,
            depth: 4,
            cost: 1000,
            color: '#3498DB',
            unlocked: false,
            moneyDeposited: 0,
            deleted: false,
          };
        }
        if (!window.gameConfig.fountain) {
          window.gameConfig.fountain = {
            x: -18,
            z: -5,
            radius: 2.5,
            deleted: false,
          };
        }
        if (!window.gameConfig.fountain2) {
          window.gameConfig.fountain2 = {
            x: -12,
            z: -3,
            radius: 2.5,
            deleted: false,
          };
        }
        if (!window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile) {
          window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile = {
            x: 18,
            z: 10,
            width: 4,
            depth: 4,
            cost: 500,
            color: '#F1C40F',
            staffHired: false,
            moneyDeposited: 0,
            deleted: false,
          };
        }

        if (window.gameConfig.driveThruTile?.unlocked) {
           createDriveThruStaffTile();
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.staffHired || window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.extraStaff1Hired || window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.extraStaff2Hired) {
           createHiredDriveThruStaff();
        }

        if (!window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile) {
          window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile = {
            x: -12,
            z: -3,
            width: 4,
            depth: 4,
            cost: 1000,
            color: '#3498DB',
            unlocked: false,
            moneyDeposited: 0,
            deleted: false,
          };
        }

        if (
          window.gameConfig.fountainTile &&
          (!window.gameConfig.fountainTile.unlocked || mode === 'edit')
        ) {
          if (shouldShowUnlockTile('fountainTile') || mode === 'edit') createFountainTile();
        }
        if (
          window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile &&
          (!window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile.unlocked || mode === 'edit')
        ) {
          if (shouldShowUnlockTile('fountainTile') || mode === 'edit') createFountain2Tile();
        }
        if (
          !window.gameConfig.fountainTile ||
          window.gameConfig.fountainTile.unlocked ||
          mode === 'edit'
        ) {
          createFountain();
        }
        if (
          !window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile ||
          window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile.unlocked ||
          mode === 'edit'
        ) {
          createFountain2();
        }

        if (!window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile) {
          window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile = {
            x: -12,
            z: 8,
            width: 4,
            depth: 4,
            cost: 500,
            color: '#2C3E50',
            unlocked: false,
            moneyDeposited: 0,
            deleted: false,
          };
        }

        // Initialize staff hire tile settings
        if (window.gameConfig.staffHireTile) {
          if (!window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.extraHireCost) {
            window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.extraHireCost = Math.max(
              150,
              Math.round(window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.hireCost * 1.5)
            );
          }
          if (window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.extraStaffHired === undefined) {
            window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.extraStaffHired = false;
          }
        }

        // Initialize cashier serve timers
        cashierServeTimer2 = 0;

        initSelfOrderKiosks();
        createSelfOrderKiosks();
        if (mode === 'edit') {
          window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles.forEach((tile) => {
            if (tile) tile.hidden = false;
          });
        } else if (!window.gameConfig.tutorialCompleted) {
          window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles.forEach((tile) => {
            if (tile) tile.hidden = true;
          });
        }
        if (window.gameConfig.tutorialCompleted || mode === 'edit') {
          createSelfOrderKioskTiles();
        }

        // Always show vault toggle
        const vaultToggle = document.getElementById('vault-toggle');
        if (vaultToggle) vaultToggle.style.display = 'flex';

        // Create existing dining table tiles from config
        if (window.gameConfig.diningTableTile && !window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles) {
          window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles = [window.gameConfig.diningTableTile];
          delete window.gameConfig.diningTableTile;
        }

        if (window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles) {
          let tableTileCreated = false;
          window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles.forEach((tile, index) => {
            if (!tile.deleted) {
              if (mode === 'edit' || (!tableTileCreated && (index === 0 || step >= 3))) {
                createDiningTableTile(index);
                if (mode !== 'edit') tableTileCreated = true;
              }
            }
          });
        }

        // Create existing dining tables from config
        if (window.gameConfig.diningTables) {
          window.gameConfig.diningTables.forEach((table, index) => {
            createDiningTable(table, index);
          });
          nextTableId = window.gameConfig.diningTables.length;
        }

        createPlayer();

        // Create resource nodes from config
        updateLoadingProgress(5, 'loading.grills');
        if (
          window.gameConfig.grillTile &&
          (!window.gameConfig.grillTile.unlocked || mode === 'edit')
        ) {
          if (step >= 1 || mode === 'edit') createGrillTile();
        }
        if (
          !window.gameConfig.grillTile ||
          window.gameConfig.grillTile.unlocked ||
          mode === 'edit'
        ) {
          const grillCount = window.gameConfig.grills.length;
          for (let i = 0; i < grillCount; i++) {
            createResourceNode(i, grillCount);
          }
        }

        // Load assets
        updateLoadingProgress(6, 'loading.images');
        loadAssetImages();

        // Initialize audio
        updateLoadingProgress(6, 'loading.sounds');
        await initAudio();

        // Cache DOM elements for performance
        cacheDOMElements();

        // Initialize game state
        updateLoadingProgress(7, 'loading.preparing');
        initGameState();

        // Setup input
        updateLoadingProgress(8, 'loading.controls');
        setupKeyboardInput();
        if (isTouchDevice) {
          try {
            setupTouchInput();
          } catch (e) {
            lib.log('setupTouchInput failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e));
          }
        }

        // Setup upgrade buttons
        updateLoadingProgress(9, 'loading.finalizing');
        setupUpgradeButtons();

        // Initialize level editor (for edit mode)
        if (mode === 'edit') {
          initLevelEditor();
        }

        // Start music in play mode
        if (mode === 'play' && window.gameConfig.settings.musicEnabled) {
          // Start music on first user interaction
          const startMusic = () => {
            playMusic();
            document.removeEventListener('touchstart', startMusic);
            document.removeEventListener('click', startMusic);
            document.removeEventListener('keydown', startMusic);
          };
          document.addEventListener('touchstart', startMusic, {
            once: true,
          });
          document.addEventListener('click', startMusic, {
            once: true,
          });
          document.addEventListener('keydown', startMusic, {
            once: true,
          });
        }

        // Complete loading
        updateLoadingProgress(10, 'loading.ready');

        // Hide loading screen after a brief delay
        setTimeout(() => {
          hideLoadingScreen();
        }, 300);

        // Start game loop
        lastTime = performance.now();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
      }

      // Helper: persist rotation value into window.gameConfig by a configKey path (e.g. 'grills.0' or 'cashierStall')
      function setConfigRotationByKey(configKey, degrees) {
        try {
          const parts = String(configKey).split('.');
          let obj = window.gameConfig;
          for (let i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
            const part = parts[i];
            if (i === parts.length - 1) {
              if (obj[part] === undefined) obj[part] = {};
              obj[part].rotation = degrees;
            } else {
              if (obj[part] === undefined) obj[part] = {};
              obj = obj[part];
            }
          }
        } catch (e) {
          lib.log('Failed to set config rotation: ' + e.message);
        }
      }

      // Rotate currently selected editable object by degrees (snaps to 90°)
      function rotateSelectedByDegrees(deltaDeg) {
        if (!editorSelectedObject || !editorSelectedObject.mesh) return;
        const mesh = editorSelectedObject.mesh;
        // current rotation in degrees normalized
        let currentDeg = THREE.MathUtils.radToDeg(mesh.rotation.y) || 0;
        // normalize to nearest integer to avoid floating drift
        currentDeg = Math.round(currentDeg);
        let newDeg = currentDeg + deltaDeg;
        // snap to 90-degree increments
        newDeg = Math.round(newDeg / 90) * 90;
        mesh.rotation.y = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(newDeg);
        // persist to config if possible
        if (editorSelectedObject.configKey) {
          setConfigRotationByKey(editorSelectedObject.configKey, newDeg);
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type && editorSelectedObject.getData) {
          // try to find matching entry in gameConfig by equality of position (best-effort fallback)
          try {
            const data = editorSelectedObject.getData();
            for (const key in window.gameConfig) {
              if (!window.gameConfig.hasOwnProperty(key)) continue;
              const entry = window.gameConfig[key];
              if (entry && typeof entry === 'object') {
                if (entry.x === data.x && entry.z === data.z) {
                  entry.rotation = newDeg;
                  break;
                }
              }
            }
          } catch (e) {}
        }
        updateSelectionHighlight();
      }

      // Wire rotate buttons and keyboard shortcut (editor mode only) if DOM exists
      (function wireRotationControls() {
        // Buttons may not exist in non-edit mode, so guard selections
        const rotL = document.getElementById('rotate-left-btn');
        const rotR = document.getElementById('rotate-right-btn');
        if (rotL) {
          rotL.addEventListener('click', () => rotateSelectedByDegrees(-90));
        }
        if (rotR) {
          rotR.addEventListener('click', () => rotateSelectedByDegrees(90));
        }
        // Keyboard 'R' rotates +90 (edit mode only)
        window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
          if (gameMode !== 'edit') return;
          if (e.key.toLowerCase() === 'r') {
            rotateSelectedByDegrees(90);
          }
        });
      })();

      // Expose run function to window for iframe runtime
      if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
        window.run = run;
      }
    </script>
  </body>
</html>

game_metadata.title: Fast food Tycoon (Remake)
game_metadata.description: You’ll step into the shoes of a fast-food manager building a world-class burger empire from the ground up.

content.text: Hey there! What kind of game do you want to create?
create a blank game there is nothing in there yet it will be decided later

content.title: The Void
content.description:
A minimalist experience where you explore an empty, abstract space. There are no objectives, just endless potential.

• An infinite, procedurally generated void
• Shape the world with your imagination

content.text: just a blank game
All set! You've got a completely blank game ready for you to build on. What would you like to create? 🎮
(user selected the game thumbnail) use this
Done! Your game now has that awesome thumbnail as its preview. 🎮

Please fix this game error:

`Game run() function threw an error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'width')`

Stack trace:
```
TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'width')
    at new ws (https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r128/three.min.js:6:336789)
    at initThreeJS (about:srcdoc:2073:16)
    at run (about:srcdoc:5072:5)
    at executeRun (about:srcdoc:1817:57)
    at about:srcdoc:1872:35
```
The crash is all fixed up, and your game is loading perfectly now! 🎮 What should we add to it next?
(user selected the game thumbnail) thumbnail of a restaurant tycoon
Your game now has an awesome Restaurant Tycoon thumbnail featuring a chef with stacked burgers and gold coins! 🍔💰
lets add some sound and generate ui icons
Your restaurant now has a shiny gold coin icon and satisfying sound effects - enjoy the cheerful "cha-ching" when you make sales and the upbeat background music while you cook! 🪙🎵
add loading bar
Added a slick loading screen with an animated progress bar - now players get a bouncing burger icon and loading tips while the kitchen fires up! 🍔
add a cashier stall you can add burgers to it and customers queue at it

Added a cashier counter where you can stock burgers and watch customers queue up to be served! 🏪 Just drop off your cooked burgers behind the counter and the hungry customers will pay up automatically.
the customers gets stuck for some reason
Fixed the traffic jam at the register! 🍔 Your hungry customers will now queue up and step forward smoothly when it's their turn.
the first batch of customers works but the second batch dont
Fixed the lunch rush traffic jam! 🍔 Your hungry customers will now keep lining up smoothly without getting stuck. What should we add next?
add a cash pile on the side of the cashier, so its earning will be individually collected, each objects will have this feature
Added a cash pile next to the cashier where customer payments stack up - walk over to vacuum up your earnings! 💵
in the editor you can delete and create objects
Added handy delete 🗑️ and copy 📋 buttons that appear when you select a grill in the editor - makes building your kitchen layout a breeze!
I dont see it
Oops, they were hiding! I moved the copy and delete buttons to the top right of your screen so you can easily spot them when you select a grill. 🛠️
I only see and x button and when you press it, it unselects the object
Ah, the copy and delete buttons only show up when you click on a Grill right now! 🍔 Want me to update the game so you can duplicate the other zones too?
im trying to delete the service counter
You can now delete any object in the editor! Just select the Service Counter and hit the 🗑️ button to remove it.

Please fix this game error:

`Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'scale')`

Stack trace:
```
TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'scale')
    at gameLoop (about:srcdoc:5601:22)
```
All fixed! You can now safely delete the Service Counter while remodeling your restaurant without any crashes. 🛠️
after deleting object in editor it doesnt reflect in game e.g. service counter
All fixed! When you delete objects like the service counter in the editor, they'll actually stay gone when you play your game. 🗑️✨
make the cashier only work if there is a staff on the booth
Now you need to stand behind the counter to serve customers! 🍔
create a staff tile near the cashier if its filled with money it will hire a staff to man the booth, you can edit the cost of the staff in the editor
Added a Staff Hire Tile near the cashier! 👨‍🍳 Deposit money on it to hire help that will serve customers automatically — you can edit the hire cost in the editor.
display the cost of the staff in real time put big numbers on the tile that decrease as you put more money in. also in the editor add properties panel you can edit on for selected objects
The staff hire tile now shows big floating numbers that count down as you deposit money! 💵 Just click any object in the editor to access its editable properties.
when you finally fill up the cashier tile it will be destroyed and smoke particles will display and a cashier will spawn the cashier will then move to the cashier booth to serve customers
Done! When you fill up the staff tile, it'll explode in a puff of smoke and your new cashier will walk over to the booth to start serving customers 💨👨‍🍳
oh no its spawned a lot of staff, only one please and the staff didnt walk to the right place  it should go the the back of the cashier booth
All fixed! Now just a single staff member will spawn and head straight behind the counter to serve your customers. 👨‍🍳✨
ok next we need dining tables, customers eat their burger there and then leave trash and the customers leave. there are dining table tiles that creates dining table so you can expand

Dining tables are in! 🪑 Customers now eat at tables after ordering, leave trash behind, and you'll need to clean up to keep seats available — deposit money on the blue dining tile to expand your seating area!
when buying a table tile I expect it to be like the cashier tile it explodes then spawn a table
Fixed! Now when you fill up the dining table tile, it explodes in a puff of smoke and a table spawns right where it was 💥🪑
bug I cant create more table tile in the editor
All fixed! You can now add and duplicate as many dining table tiles as you want in the editor, letting players build out a massive dining area! 🪑✨
bug I cant spend money on the table tile
All fixed! You can now drop your cash on those tiles to unlock new dining tables and expand your restaurant. 🪑💸
add a trash bin, you can throw anything in it
Trash bin added! 🗑️ Walk near it with burgers or money and they'll get tossed in automatically — perfect for clearing out your inventory!
trash bin looks too fance just make it a simple grey bucket that has an emoji trash on top of it
Simplified! Now it's just a clean grey bucket with a 🗑️ emoji floating above it.
add a config to toggle customers leaving trash
Added a "Customers Leave Trash" toggle in the game settings — flip it off for a spotless dining area! 🧹
add more types of staff tiles, one creates a staff that cleans up tables, and another one that collects burgers and delivers it to the cashier
Added two new staff tiles — hire a Cleaner 🧹 who automatically tidies up dirty tables, and a Runner 🏃 who picks up burgers and delivers them to the cashier for you!
bug the staff doesnt collect the grill it should use the grill and pick up burgers
Fixed! Your Runner Staff will now collect freshly cooked burgers straight from the grills and rush them to the cashier. 🏃🍔

Please fix this game error:

`Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected end of input`

Stack trace:
```
SyntaxError: Unexpected end of input
```
All fixed! The restaurant is running smoothly again and your customers are ready for their burgers. 🍔🏃
bug customers are getting stuck again
All fixed! Your hungry customers will no longer get stuck waiting in line for their burgers. 🍔🏃
I wanna see the customer bring the burger in the table and eat also display an emoji on top of their head to know their emotion
Customers now carry their burgers to the table and you can watch them eat! Plus they've got emoji moods floating above their heads — 🙂 when waiting, 😋 when eating, and 😠 if they wait too long!
make the staff use the grills and then collect burgers automatically
Your Runner Staff will now head to the grills, cook up burgers, and deliver them straight to the cashier — full automation! 🏃🍔
when there's no available table the customer doesnt buy a burger
Fixed! Now customers will wait patiently in line until a table opens up before buying their burger 🍔🪑
Optimize performance
Your restaurant should run much smoother now, even when it's packed with customers and flying burgers! 🍔⚡
add autosave and also add a config to toggle it
Your progress now saves automatically every 30 seconds, and you can toggle it on/off in the Game Settings! 💾
add config for staff pricing, tables pricing, burger pricing
